27633.title: The Drug Crisis and the Living Arrangements of Children
27633.zh_title: 毒品危机与儿童居住安排
27633.authors: Kasey Buckles, William N. Evans, Ethan M.J. Lieber
27633.abstract: We examine the impact of the drug crisis that has unfolded over the last three decades in the United States on children’s living arrangements and environments. Because the current living arrangement could be a result of events that occurred at any point in a child’s life, we measure children’s exposure to the crisis with the cumulative drug-related mortality of likely parents. A potential omitted variables bias complicates the analysis, as the factors that may have led parents to abuse drugs could also have altered the living arrangements of their children. Within a 2SLS framework, we instrument for the cumulative mortality of likely parents with a child’s years of exposure to a non-triplicate prescription pad environment. Previous work by Alpert et al. (2019) demonstrates that pharmaceutical advertising was much more extensive in non-triplicate states and fostered the development of the drug crisis. Our results indicate that OLS and 2SLS estimates are nearly identical and the crisis increased both the fraction of children living away from a parent and in a household headed by a grandparent. We estimate that if drug abuse had remained at 1996 levels, 1.5 million fewer children aged 0-16 would have lived away from a parent in 2015.
27633.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国过去三十年来不断加剧的毒品危机对儿童居住安排和环境的影响。由于当前的居住安排可能是儿童生命中任何时间点发生的事件的结果，我们通过潜在父母的累积毒品相关死亡率来衡量儿童接触危机的程度。潜在遗漏变量偏差使分析复杂化，因为可能导致父母滥用毒品的因素也可能改变了他们子女的居住安排。在2SLS框架内，我们使用儿童暴露于非三联处方垫环境的年数作为潜在父母累积死亡率的工具变量。Alpert等人（2019）先前的研究表明，在非三联州，药品广告更为广泛，并促进了毒品危机的发展。我们的结果表明，OLS和2SLS估计几乎相同，并且危机增加了儿童不与父母同住以及由祖父母担任户主的比例。我们估计，如果药物滥用保持在1996年的水平，那么2010年0-16岁儿童中不与父母同住的人数将减少150万。

27632.title: The Economic Consequences of R̂ = 1: Towards a Workable Behavioural Epidemiological Model of Pandemics
27632.zh_title: R̂=1的经济后果：迈向可行的流行病行为流行病学模型
27632.abstract: This paper reviews the literature on incorporating behavioural elements into epidemiological models of pandemics. While modelling behaviour by forward-looking rational agents can provide some insight into the time paths of pandemics, the non-stationary nature of Susceptible-Infected-Removed (SIR) models of viral spread makes characterisation of resulting equilibria difficult. Here I posit a shortcut that can be deployed to allow for a tractable equilibrium model of pandemics with intuitive comparative statics and also a clear prediction that effective reproduction numbers (that is, R) will tend towards 1 in equilibrium. This motivates taking R̂=1 as an equilibrium starting point for analyses of pandemics with behavioural agents. The implications of this for the analysis of widespread testing, tracing, isolation and mask-use is discussed.
27632.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了将行为因素纳入流行病学模型的相关文献。虽然通过前瞻性理性主体的行为建模可以为流行病的时间路径提供一些见解，但病毒传播的易感-感染-移除（SIR）模型的非平稳性使得对由此产生的均衡进行刻画变得困难。在此，我提出一种捷径，可用于构建一个易于处理的流行病均衡模型，该模型具有直观的比较静态分析，并且明确预测有效再生数（即R）在均衡中趋向于1。这促使将R̂=1作为分析具有行为主体的流行病的均衡起点。本文讨论了这一点对广泛检测、追踪、隔离和口罩使用分析的影响。

27631.title: Persuasion on Networks
27631.abstract: We analyze persuasion in a model in which each receiver can buy a direct access to the sender's signal or rely on her network connections to get it. For the sender, a higher bias increases the impact per direct receiver, yet diminishes the willingness of agents to receive information. Contrary to naive intuition, the optimal propaganda might target peripheral, rather than centrally-located agents, and is at its maximum levels when the probability that information flows between agents is close to zero or one, but not in-between. The impact of network density depends on this probability as well.
27631.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一个模型中的说服，其中每个接收者可以购买直接访问发送者信号的权限，或者依赖其网络连接来获取信号。对于发送者而言，更高的偏见增加了每个直接接收者的影响，但降低了代理人接收信息的意愿。与直觉相反，最优宣传可能针对外围而非中心位置的代理人，并且当信息在代理人之间流动的概率接近零或一时达到最大水平，而非介于两者之间。网络密度的影响也取决于这一概率。

27630.title: Self-Harming Trade Policy? Protectionism and Production Networks
27630.zh_title: 自残性贸易政策？保护主义与生产网络
27630.abstract: Using monthly data on temporary trade barriers (TTBs), we estimate the dynamic employment effects of protectionism through vertical production linkages. First, exploiting procedural details of TTBs and high-frequency data, we identify movements in protectionism exogenous to economic fundamentals. We then use input-output tables to construct measures of protectionism affecting downstream producers. Finally, we estimate panel local projections using the identified trade-policy shocks. Protectionism has small and insignificant beneficial effects in protected industries. In contrast, the effects in downstream industries are negative, sizable, and significant. The employment decline follows an increase in intermediate-inputs and final goods prices.
27630.zh_abstract: 利用临时贸易壁垒（TTBs）的月度数据，我们通过垂直生产联系估计了保护主义的动态就业效应。首先，利用TTB的程序细节和高频数据，我们识别出外生于经济基本面的保护主义变动。然后，我们使用投入产出表构建影响下游生产者的保护主义衡量指标。最后，我们利用识别出的贸易政策冲击估计面板局部投影。保护主义在受保护行业中具有微小且不显著的有利效应。相比之下，对下游行业的影响是负面的、显著的且规模较大。就业下降伴随着中间投入品和最终商品价格的上涨。

27629.title: Small Business Survival Capabilities and Policy Effectiveness: Evidence from Oakland
27629.zh_title: 小企业生存能力与政策有效性：来自奥克兰的证据
27629.authors: Robert P. Bartlett III, Adair Morse
27629.abstract: Using unique City of Oakland data during COVID-19, we document that small business survival capabilities vary by firm size as a function of revenue resiliency, labor flexibility, and committed costs. Nonemployer businesses rely on low cost structures to survive 73% declines in own-store foot traffic. Microbusinesses (1-to-5 employees) depend on 14% greater revenue resiliency. Enterprises (6-to-50 employees) have twice-as-much labor flexibility, but face 11%-to-22% higher residual closure risk from committed costs. Finally, inconsistent with the spirit of Chetty-Friedman-Hendren-Sterner (2020) and Granja-Makridis-Yannelis-Zwick (2020), PPP application success increased medium-run survival probability by 20.5%, but only for microbusinesses, arguing for size-targeting of policies.
27629.zh_abstract: 利用COVID-19期间奥克兰市的独特数据，我们记录了小企业生存能力因企业规模而异，表现为收入韧性、劳动力灵活性和固定成本的函数。无雇员企业依赖低成本结构来应对自身店铺客流量73%的下降。微型企业（1-5名员工）依赖于14%更高的收入韧性。企业（6-50名员工）拥有两倍的劳动力灵活性，但面临因固定成本导致的11%至22%更高的残余关闭风险。最后，与Chetty-Friedman-Hendren-Sterner（2020）和Granja-Makridis-Yannelis-Zwick（2020）的精神不一致的是，PPP申请成功将中期生存概率提高了20.5%，但仅对微型企业有效，这支持了政策应针对企业规模进行定位。
27629.meta: Programs：CF, LS, ME, PR；JEL：E61, G38, H32, J65, L26

27628.title: Window Dressing in the Public Sector: A Case Study of China’s Compulsory Education Promotion Program
27628.zh_title: 公共部门的粉饰门面：中国义务教育促进计划的案例研究
27628.authors: Hanming Fang, Chang Liu, Li-An Zhou
27628.abstract: We examine window dressing phenomenon in the public sector by studying the strategic responses of Chinese local officials to the compulsory education promotion program launched by the central government in the 1990s. According to this program, the Chinese counties should receive inspections on whether the compulsory educational targets were achieved on pre-scheduled time by provincial governments; and failing to pass the inspection would have severe negative career consequences for the county leaders. We find that county-level educational expenditures saw a sustained increase before the inspection, but a sharp drop immediately after the inspection. Local officials who were more likely to be inspected within their tenures window-dressed more aggressively. As a result, middle school enrollment rates declined significantly after the inspection, and rural girls bore the blunt of the decline in school enrollment.
27628.zh_abstract: 我们通过研究中国地方官员对1990年代中央政府发起的义务教育促进计划的策略性反应，考察了公共部门的粉饰门面现象。根据该计划，中国各县应接受省级政府关于义务教育目标是否按预定时间实现的检查；未能通过检查将对县级领导产生严重的负面职业后果。我们发现，县级教育支出在检查前持续增加，但在检查后立即急剧下降。在其任期内更有可能接受检查的地方官员粉饰门面更为积极。结果，检查后中学入学率显著下降，农村女孩在入学率下降中首当其冲。
27628.meta: Programs：DEV, PE, POL；JEL：D73, H11, H41, P26

27627.title: Understanding the German Criticism of the Target System and the Role of Central Bank capital
27627.zh_title: 理解德国对Target系统的批评及中央银行资本的作用
27627.abstract: Criticism of the Target system by a group of central European scholars has become a widespread argument against the policies of the European Central Bank and even the integrity of the monetary union, and even standard fare in the media and in the political debate in Germany. Most academics and practitioners that have participated in the debate have been dismissive of the German preoccupations. In this paper, I first try and clarify the many remaining misunderstandings about the workings and implications of the Target system. I propose a unified, systematic and simple approach to the study of the workings of the Target system in response to different shocks and in comparison with different alternative regimes. I then argue that the German criticism of the Target system is not so unfounded after all, and should be taken seriously, both on theoretical grounds and for its political implications.
27627.zh_abstract: 一群中欧学者对Target系统的批评已成为反对欧洲央行政策甚至货币联盟完整性的广泛论点，并在德国媒体和政治辩论中成为常见话题。参与辩论的大多数学者和从业者一直对德国的担忧不屑一顾。在本文中，我首先试图澄清关于Target系统运作和影响的许多剩余误解。我提出一个统一、系统且简单的方法来研究Target系统在不同冲击下的运作，并与不同替代制度进行比较。然后，我认为德国对Target系统的批评并非毫无根据，无论是从理论角度还是其政治影响来看，都应认真对待。

27626.title: Do State Earned Income Tax Credits Increase Participation in the Federal EITC?
27626.zh_title: 州劳动所得税抵免是否增加了联邦EITC的参与？
27626.abstract: In recent years, many states and some local governments implemented or expanded their own supplemental Earned Income Tax Credits (EITCs). The expansion of state EITCs may have stemmed in large part from wanting to provide a more generous program than the federal program, because state EITCs increase transfer payments to low-income recipients who qualify. However, state and local governments can also benefit from maximizing participation of their constituents in the federal EITC, and there are several reasons why state or local EITCs could increase participation in the federal EITC program. We find some evidence suggesting that state EITCs may increase federal EITC program participation among low-skilled single filers with children.
27626.zh_abstract: 近年来，许多州和一些地方政府实施或扩大了自己的补充劳动所得税抵免（EITC）。州EITC的扩张在很大程度上可能源于希望提供比联邦计划更慷慨的计划，因为州EITC增加了对符合条件的低收入受助人的转移支付。然而，州和地方政府也可以从最大化其选民参与联邦EITC中受益，并且有几个原因表明州或地方EITC可以增加联邦EITC计划的参与。我们发现一些证据表明，州EITC可能增加了有子女的低技能单身申报者参与联邦EITC计划的比例。

27625.title: The Macroeconomic Consequences of Infrastructure Investment
27625.zh_title: 基础设施投资的宏观经济后果
27625.abstract: Can greater investment in infrastructure raise U.S. long-run output? Are infrastructure projects a good short-run stimulus to the economy? This paper uses insights from the macroeconomics literature to address these questions. I begin by analyzing the effects of government investment in both a stylized neoclassical model and a medium-scale New Keynesian model, highlighting the economic mechanisms that govern the strength of the short-run and long-run impacts. The analysis confirms earlier findings that the implementation delays inherent in infrastructure projects reduce short-run multipliers in most cases. In contrast, long-run multipliers can be sizable when government capital is productive. Moreover, these multipliers are greater if the economy starts from a point below the socially optimal amount of public capital. Turning to empirical estimation, I use the theoretical model to explain the econometric challenges to estimating the elasticity of output to public infrastructure. Using both artificial data generated by simulations of the model and extensions of existing empirical work, I demonstrate how both general equilibrium effects and optimal choice of public capital are likely to impart upward biases to output elasticity estimates. Finally, I review and extend some empirical estimates of the short-run effects, focusing on infrastructure spending in the ARRA.
27625.zh_abstract: 增加基础设施投资能否提高美国的长期产出？基础设施项目能否成为良好的短期经济刺激手段？本文利用宏观经济学文献的见解来探讨这些问题。我首先在一个简化的新古典模型和一个中等规模的新凯恩斯模型中分析政府投资的影响，重点阐述决定短期和长期影响强度的经济机制。分析证实了早期发现：在大多数情况下，基础设施项目固有的实施延迟会降低短期乘数。相比之下，当政府资本具有生产力时，长期乘数可能相当可观。此外，如果经济从低于社会最优公共资本存量的起点开始，这些乘数会更大。转向实证估计时，我利用理论模型来解释估计产出对公共基础设施弹性所面临的计量经济学挑战。通过使用模型模拟生成的人工数据以及对现有实证工作的扩展，我展示了一般均衡效应和公共资本的最优选择如何可能使产出弹性估计产生向上偏差。最后，我回顾并扩展了一些关于短期影响的实证估计，重点关注《美国复苏与再投资法案》中的基础设施支出。

27624.title: Information Frictions and Access to the Paycheck Protection Program
27624.zh_title: 信息摩擦与薪资保护计划的获取
27624.authors: Christopher Neilson, John Eric Humphries, Gabriel Ulyssea
27624.abstract: The Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) extended 669 billion dollars of forgivable loans in an unprecedented effort to support small businesses affected by the COVID-19 crisis. This paper provides evidence that information frictions and the “first-come, first-served” design of the PPP program skewed its resources towards larger firms and may have permanently reduced its effectiveness. Using new daily survey data on small businesses in the U.S., we show that the smallest businesses were less aware of the PPP and less likely to apply. If they did apply, the smallest businesses applied later, faced longer processing times, and were less likely to have their application approved. These frictions may have mattered, as businesses that received aid report fewer layoffs, higher employment, and improved expectations about the future.
27624.zh_abstract: 薪资保护计划（PPP）发放了6690亿美元的可豁免贷款，这是一项前所未有的努力，旨在支持受COVID-19危机影响的小企业。本文提供的证据表明，信息摩擦和PPP计划的“先到先得”设计使其资源向规模较大的企业倾斜，并可能永久性地降低了其有效性。利用关于美国小企业的新每日调查数据，我们显示，最小规模的企业对PPP的了解较少，申请的可能性也更低。即使它们申请了，最小规模的企业申请时间也更晚，面临更长的处理时间，并且其申请获批的可能性也更低。这些摩擦可能至关重要，因为获得援助的企业报告称裁员更少、就业更高，并且对未来的预期有所改善。

27623.title: When Should Public Programs be Privately Administered? Theory and Evidence from the Paycheck Protection Program
27623.zh_title: 公共项目何时应由私人管理？来自薪资保护计划的理论与证据
27623.authors: Alexander W. Bartik, Zoe B. Cullen, Edward L. Glaeser, Michael Luca, Christopher T. Stanton, Adi Sunderam
27623.abstract: What happens when public resources are allocated by private companies whose objectives may be imperfectly aligned with policy goals? We study this question in the context of the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP), which relied on private banks to disburse aid to small businesses rapidly. Our model shows that delegation is optimal when delay is sufficiently costly, variation across firms in the impact of funds is small, and the alignment between public and private objectives is high. We use novel firm-level survey data that contains information on banking relationships to measure heterogeneity in the impact of PPP and to assess whether banks targeted loans to high-impact firms. Banks did target loans to their most valuable pre-existing customers. However, using an instrumental variables approach that exploits variation in banks’ loan processing speeds, we find that treatment effect heterogeneity is sufficiently moderate, delay is sufficiently costly, and bank and social objectives are sufficiently aligned that delegation was likely superior to delaying loans to improve targeting.
27623.zh_abstract: 当公共资源由目标可能与政策目标不完全一致的私营公司分配时，会发生什么？我们在薪资保护计划（PPP）的背景下研究这个问题，该计划依赖私营银行快速向小企业发放援助。我们的模型表明，当延迟成本足够高、资金影响在企业间的差异较小，以及公共目标与私人目标之间的契合度较高时，委托是最优的。我们利用包含银行关系信息的新型企业层面调查数据，来衡量PPP影响的异质性，并评估银行是否将贷款瞄准了高影响企业。银行确实将贷款瞄准了其最有价值的现有客户。然而，利用基于银行贷款处理速度差异的工具变量方法，我们发现处理效应异质性足够温和、延迟成本足够高，且银行目标与社会目标足够一致，以至于委托可能优于为了改善目标定位而延迟贷款。
27623.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D22, G01, G2, L26, M13

27622.title: Efficient Redistribution
27622.abstract: What are the most eﬃcient means of redistribution in an unequal economy? We answer this question by characterizing the optimal shape of non-linear income and wealth taxes in a dynamic general equilibrium model with uninsurable idiosyncratic risk. Our analysis reproduces the distribution of income and wealth in the United States and explicitly takes into account the long-lived transition dynamics after policy reforms. We ﬁnd that a uniform ﬂat tax on capital and labor income combined with a lump-sum transfer is nearly optimal. Though allowing for increasing marginal income and wealth taxes raises welfare, the incremental gains are small due to strong behavioral and general equilibrium eﬀects. This result is robust to changing household preferences, the distribution of ability, the planner’s preference for redistribution, as well as to explicitly modeling private business ownership and the ensuing heterogeneity in rates of return.
27622.zh_abstract: 在一个不平等经济中，最有效的再分配手段是什么？我们通过在一个具有不可保险异质性风险的动态一般均衡模型中刻画非线性所得税和财富税的最优形状来回答这个问题。我们的分析再现了美国的收入和财富分布，并明确考虑了政策改革后的长期过渡动态。我们发现，对资本和劳动收入征收统一的单一税，并结合一次性转移支付，几乎是次优的。尽管允许递增的边际所得税和财富税能提高福利，但由于强烈的行为效应和一般均衡效应，增量收益很小。这一结果对于改变家庭偏好、能力分布、规划者对再分配的偏好，以及明确建模私营企业所有权及其导致的回报率异质性，都是稳健的。

27621.title: Effects of State COVID-19 Closure Policy on NON-COVID-19 Health Care Utilization
27621.zh_title: 州COVID-19关闭政策对非COVID-19医疗保健利用的影响
27621.authors: Engy Ziedan, Kosali I. Simon, Coady Wing
27621.abstract: The U.S. health care system has experienced great pressure since early March 2020 as it pivoted to providing necessary care for COVID-19 patients. But there are signs that non-COVID-19 care use declined during this time period. We examine near real time data from a nationwide electronic healthcare records system that covers over 35 million patients to provide new evidence of how non-COVID-19 acute care and preventive/primary care have been affected during the epidemic. \nUsing event study and difference-in-difference models we find that state closure policies (stay-at-home or non-essential business closures) are associated with large declines in ambulatory visits, with effects differing by type of care. State closure policies reduced overall outpatient visits by about 15-16 percent within two weeks. Outpatient visits for health check-ups and well care experience very large declines during the epidemic, with substantial effects from state closure policies. In contrast, mental health outpatient visits declined less than other care, and appear less affected by state closure policies. We find substitution to telehealth modalities may have played an important role in mitigating the decline in mental health care utilization. \nAggregate trends in outpatient visits show a 40% decline after the first week of March 2020, only a portion of which is attributed to state policy. A rebound starts around mid April that does not appear to be explained by state reopening policy. Despite this rebound, care visits still remain below the pre-epidemic levels in most cases.
27621.zh_abstract: 自2020年3月初以来，美国医疗保健系统承受了巨大压力，因为它转向为COVID-19患者提供必要的护理。但有迹象表明，在此期间非COVID-19护理的使用有所下降。我们检查了覆盖超过3500万患者的全国性电子医疗记录系统的近实时数据，以提供关于非COVID-19急性护理和预防/初级护理在疫情期间如何受到影响的新证据。利用事件研究和双重差分模型，我们发现州关闭政策（居家令或非必要企业关闭）与门诊就诊量的大幅下降相关，其影响因护理类型而异。州关闭政策在两周内使总体门诊就诊量减少了约15-16%。疫情期间，健康检查和保健护理的门诊就诊量出现非常大幅度的下降，州关闭政策产生了实质性影响。相比之下，心理健康门诊就诊量的下降幅度小于其他护理，并且似乎受州关闭政策的影响较小。我们发现，转向远程医疗模式可能在缓解心理健康护理利用下降方面发挥了重要作用。门诊就诊量的总体趋势显示，在2020年3月第一周后下降了40%，其中只有一部分归因于州政策。大约在4月中旬开始出现反弹，但这似乎并非由州重新开放政策所解释。尽管出现反弹，但在大多数情况下，护理就诊量仍低于疫情前水平。

27620.title: Immigration and Violent Crime: Evidence from the Colombia-Venezuela Border
27620.zh_title: 移民与暴力犯罪：来自哥伦比亚-委内瑞拉边境的证据
27620.abstract: This paper investigates the link between violent crime and immigration using data from Colombian municipalities during the recent episode of immigration from Venezuela. The key finding is that, following the closing and then re-opening of the border in 2016, which precipitated a massive immigration wave, homicides in Colombia increased in areas close to the border with Venezuela. Using information on the nationality of the victim, we find that this increase was driven by homicides involving Venezuelan victims, with no evidence of a statistically significant increase in homicides in which Colombians were victimized. Thus, in contrast to xenophobic fears that migrants might victimize natives, it was migrants, rather than natives, who faced risks associated with immigration. Using arrests data, there is no corresponding increase in arrests for homicides in these areas. Taken together, these results suggest that the increase in homicides close to the border documented here are driven by crimes against migrants and have occurred without a corresponding increase in arrests, suggesting that some of these crimes have gone unsolved.
27620.zh_abstract: 本文利用哥伦比亚市镇在近期委内瑞拉移民潮期间的数据，调查了暴力犯罪与移民之间的联系。关键发现是，在2016年边境关闭然后重新开放，从而引发大规模移民浪潮之后，哥伦比亚靠近委内瑞拉边境地区的凶杀案有所增加。利用受害者国籍信息，我们发现这一增长是由涉及委内瑞拉受害者的凶杀案驱动的，没有证据表明涉及哥伦比亚受害者的凶杀案有统计上显著的增加。因此，与移民可能伤害本地人的仇外恐惧相反，面临移民相关风险的是移民而非本地人。利用逮捕数据，这些地区的凶杀案逮捕人数并未相应增加。综合来看，这些结果表明，本文记录的边境附近凶杀案增加是由针对移民的犯罪驱动的，并且是在逮捕人数没有相应增加的情况下发生的，这表明其中一些犯罪尚未侦破。

27619.title: Local Access to Mental Healthcare and Crime
27619.zh_title: 本地心理健康医疗服务可及性与犯罪
27619.authors: Monica Deza, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Keisha T. Solomon
27619.abstract: We estimate the effect of local access to office-based mental healthcare on crime. We leverage variation in the number of mental healthcare offices within a county over the period 1999 to 2014 in a two-way fixed-effects model. We find that increases in the number of mental healthcare offices modestly reduce crime. In particular, ten additional offices in a county reduces crime by 1.7 crimes per 10,000 residents. These findings suggest an unintended benefit from expanding the office-based mental healthcare workforce: reductions in crime.
27619.zh_abstract: 我们估计了本地基于办公室的心理健康医疗服务可及性对犯罪的影响。我们利用1999年至2014年间一个县内心理健康医疗办公室数量的变化，采用双向固定效应模型进行分析。我们发现，心理健康医疗办公室数量的增加会适度减少犯罪。具体而言，一个县内增加十个办公室，每万名居民中的犯罪数量减少1.7起。这些发现表明，扩大基于办公室的心理健康医疗队伍会带来一个意想不到的好处：减少犯罪。

27618.title: Intergenerational and Sibling Spillovers in High School Majors
27618.zh_title: 高中专业选择中的代际和兄弟姐妹溢出效应
27618.authors: Gordon B. Dahl, Dan-Olof Rooth, Anders Stenberg
27618.abstract: This paper estimates family spillovers in high school major choice in Sweden, where admission to oversubscribed majors is determined based on GPA. Using a regression discontinuity design, we find large sibling and intergenerational spillovers that depend on the gender mix of a dyad. Same-gender siblings copy one another, while younger brothers recoil from older sister’s choices. Fathers and mothers influence sons, but not their daughters, except when a mother majors in the male-dominated program of Engineering. Back of the envelope calculations reveal these within family spillovers have sizable implications for the gender composition of majors.
27618.zh_abstract: 本文估计了瑞典高中专业选择中的家庭溢出效应，其中超额申请专业的录取基于平均绩点决定。利用断点回归设计，我们发现存在显著的兄弟姐妹和代际溢出效应，且这些效应取决于二人组合的性别构成。同性别的兄弟姐妹会相互模仿，而弟弟则会回避姐姐的选择。父亲和母亲影响儿子，但不影响女儿，除非母亲主修男性主导的工程项目。粗略计算表明，这些家庭内部的溢出效应对专业的性别构成具有显著影响。

27617.title: Initial Impacts of the Pandemic on Consumer Behavior: Evidence from Linked Income, Spending, and Savings Data
27617.zh_title: 疫情对消费者行为的初步影响：来自收入、支出和储蓄关联数据的证据
27617.authors: Natalie Bachas, Peter Ganong, Pascal J. Noel, Joseph S. Vavra, Arlene Wong, Diana Farrell, Fiona E. Greig
27617.abstract: We use U.S. household-level bank account data to investigate the heterogeneous effects of the pandemic on spending and savings. Households across the income distribution all cut spending from March to early April. Since mid April, spending has rebounded most rapidly for low-income households. We find large increases in liquid asset balances for households throughout the income distribution. However, lower-income households contribute disproportionately to the aggregate increase in balances, relative to their pre-pandemic shares. Taken together, our results suggest that spending declines in the initial months of the recession were primarily caused by direct effects of the pandemic, rather than resulting from labor market disruptions. The sizable growth in liquid assets we observe for low-income households suggests that stimulus and insurance programs during this period likely played an important role in limiting the effects of labor market disruptions on spending.
27617.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国家庭层面的银行账户数据，研究疫情对支出和储蓄的异质性影响。不同收入水平的家庭在3月至4月初均削减了支出。自4月中旬以来，低收入家庭的支出反弹最为迅速。我们发现，各收入水平家庭的流动资产余额均大幅增加。然而，与疫情前所占份额相比，低收入家庭对总余额增长的贡献不成比例地更大。综合来看，我们的结果表明，衰退最初几个月的支出下降主要是由疫情的直接影响造成的，而非劳动力市场中断所致。我们观察到的低收入家庭流动资产显著增长表明，此期间的刺激和保险计划可能在限制劳动力市场中断对支出的影响方面发挥了重要作用。
27617.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PE；JEL：E21, E6, E62, H31

27616.title: The Impact of Social Security on Pension Claiming and Retirement: Active vs. Passive Decisions
27616.zh_title: 社会保障对养老金申领和退休的影响：主动决策与被动决策
27616.authors: Rafael Lalive, Arvind Magesan, Stefan Staubli
27616.abstract: We exploit a unique Swiss reform to identify the importance of passivity, claiming social security benefits at the Full Retirement Age (FRA). Sharp discontinuities generated by the reform reveal that raising the FRA while imposing small early claiming penalties significantly delays pension claiming and retirement, but imposing large penalties and holding the FRA fixed does not. The nature of the reform allows us to identify that between 47 and 69% of individuals are passive, while imposing additional structure point identifies the fraction at 67%. An original survey of Swiss pensioners reveals that reference-dependent preferences is the main source of passivity.
27616.zh_abstract: 我们利用瑞士一项独特的改革来识别被动性（即在正常退休年龄申领社会保障福利）的重要性。改革产生的急剧不连续性表明，提高正常退休年龄同时施加较小的提前申领惩罚，会显著延迟养老金申领和退休，但施加较大惩罚并保持正常退休年龄不变则不会。改革的性质使我们能够识别出47%至69%的个体是被动的，而施加额外结构则精确地将这一比例确定为67%。一项针对瑞士养老金领取者的原始调查显示，参照依赖偏好是被动性的主要来源。

27615.title: A Quantity-Driven Theory of Term Premia and Exchange Rates
27615.zh_title: 期限溢价和汇率的数量驱动理论
27615.authors: Robin Greenwood, Samuel G. Hanson, Jeremy C. Stein, Adi Sunderam
27615.abstract: We develop a model in which specialized bond investors must absorb shocks to the supply and demand for long-term bonds in two currencies. Since long-term bonds and foreign exchange are both exposed to unexpected movements in short-term interest rates, a shift in the supply of long-term bonds in one currency influences the foreign exchange rate between the two currencies, as well as bond term premia in both currencies. Our model matches several important empirical patterns, including the co-movement between exchange rates and term premia, as well as the finding that central banks' quantitative easing policies impact exchange rates. An extension of our model sheds light on the persistent deviations from covered interest rate parity that have emerged since 2008.
27615.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个模型，其中专业债券投资者必须吸收两种货币长期债券供需的冲击。由于长期债券和外汇都面临短期利率意外变动的风险，一种货币长期债券供给的变化会影响两种货币之间的汇率，以及两种货币的债券期限溢价。我们的模型匹配了几个重要的实证模式，包括汇率与期限溢价之间的共同变动，以及中央银行量化宽松政策影响汇率的发现。我们模型的扩展揭示了自2008年以来出现的持续违反抛补利率平价的现象。

27614.title: Rule of Law in Labor Relations, 1898-1940
27614.abstract: The paper examines changes in labor regulation between 1898 and 1940 in the context of issues related to rule of law in two areas. 1) Many see the 1905 Lochner Supreme Court decision on men’s hours laws as the beginning of 30 years in which labor regulation was stymied by the doctrine of “freedom of contract.” Seeing close votes and substantial turnover of judges on the Supreme Court, the de facto situation was more complex as some states maintained their laws or passed new ones. 2) Labor disputes led to some of the greatest threats to rule of law. To limit descents into violence, states passed arbitration laws, pro-union laws, and anti-union laws. Uncertainty about the rules led to a sharp rise in strikes and violence after World War I and again when Congress and the states sought to establish the rules for collective bargaining between 1932 and 1937. A panel analysis of the impact of state laws in bituminous coal mining from 1902 to 1941 shows that the arbitration and pro-union laws were associated with less violence during periods of uncertainty. During several periods state pro-union laws were associated with more strikes and state anti-union laws with fewer strikes.
27614.zh_abstract: 本文考察了1898年至1940年间劳动法规的变化，涉及两个领域的法治相关问题。1) 许多人将1905年最高法院关于男性工时法的“洛克纳”判决视为“契约自由”原则阻碍劳动法规的30年开端。鉴于最高法院法官的接近投票和大量更替，实际情况更为复杂，因为一些州维持了其法律或通过了新法律。2) 劳资纠纷导致了法治面临的一些最大威胁。为限制暴力升级，各州通过了仲裁法、亲工会法和反工会法。规则的不确定性导致第一次世界大战后以及1932年至1937年间国会和各州试图确立集体谈判规则时，罢工和暴力事件急剧增加。对1902年至1941年烟煤开采业州级法律影响的面板分析表明，在不确定时期，仲裁法和亲工会法与较少的暴力相关。在几个时期，州亲工会法与更多罢工相关，而州反工会法则与更少罢工相关。
27614.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：H77, J08, J52, J88, K31, N31, N32

27613.title: Measuring the labor market at the onset of the COVID-19 crisis
27613.zh_title: COVID-19危机初期的劳动力市场测量
27613.authors: Alexander W. Bartik, Marianne Bertrand, Feng Lin, Jesse Rothstein, Matt Unrath
27613.abstract: We use traditional and non-traditional data to measure the collapse and partial recovery of the U.S. labor market from March to early July, contrast this downturn to previous recessions, and provide preliminary evidence on the effects of the policy response. For hourly workers at both small and large businesses, nearly all of the decline in employment occurred between March 14 and 28. It was driven by low-wage services, particularly the retail and leisure and hospitality sectors. A large share of the job losses in small businesses reflected firms that closed entirely, though many subsequently reopened. Firms that were already unhealthy were more likely to close and less likely to reopen, and disadvantaged workers were more likely to be laid off and less likely to return. Most laid off workers expected to be recalled, and this was predictive of rehiring. Shelter-in-place orders drove only a small share of job losses. Last, states that received more small business loans from the Paycheck Protection Program and states with more generous unemployment insurance benefits had milder declines and faster recoveries. We find no evidence that high UI replacement rates drove job losses or slowed rehiring.
27613.zh_abstract: 我们利用传统和非传统数据来衡量美国劳动力市场从3月到7月初的崩溃和部分复苏，将此次衰退与之前的衰退进行对比，并提供政策应对效果的初步证据。对于小型和大型企业的时薪工人而言，几乎所有的就业下降都发生在3月14日至28日之间。这主要是由低工资服务业推动的，特别是零售业以及休闲和酒店业。小企业失业的很大一部分反映了完全关闭的企业，尽管许多后来重新开业。原本就不健康的企业更有可能关闭且不太可能重新开业，而弱势工人更有可能被解雇且不太可能返回。大多数被解雇的工人期望被召回，这预示着重新雇佣。居家令仅导致了很小一部分失业。最后，获得更多薪资保护计划小企业贷款的州以及提供更慷慨失业保险福利的州，经历了更温和的下降和更快的复苏。我们没有发现证据表明高失业保险替代率导致了失业或减缓了重新雇佣。

27612.title: Collaborating During Coronavirus: The Impact of COVID-19 on the Nature of Work
27612.zh_title: 新冠疫情期间的协作：COVID-19对工作性质的影响
27612.authors: Evan DeFilippis, Stephen Michael Impink, Madison Singell, Jeffrey T. Polzer, Raffaella Sadun
27612.abstract: We explore the impact of COVID-19 on employee's digital communication patterns through an event study of lockdowns in 16 large metropolitan areas in North America, Europe and the Middle East. Using de- identified, aggregated meeting and email meta-data from 3,143,270 users, we find, compared to pre- pandemic levels, increases in the number of meetings per person (+12.9 percent) and the number of attendees per meeting (+13.5 percent), but decreases in the average length of meetings (-20.1 percent). Collectively, the net effect is that people spent less time in meetings per day (-11.5 percent) in the post- lockdown period. We also find significant and durable increases in length of the average workday (+8.2 percent, or +48.5 minutes), along with short-term increases in email activity. These findings provide insight from a novel dataset into how the nature of work has changed for a large sample of knowledge workers. We discuss these changes in light of the ongoing challenges faced by organizations and workers struggling to adapt and perform in the face of a global pandemic.
27612.zh_abstract: 我们通过对北美、欧洲和中东16个大都市区封锁的事件研究，探讨了COVID-19对员工数字沟通模式的影响。利用来自3,143,270名用户的去标识化、汇总的会议和电子邮件元数据，我们发现，与疫情前水平相比，每人会议数量（+12.9%）和每次会议参会人数（+13.5%）有所增加，但会议平均时长（-20.1%）有所下降。总体而言，净效应是人们在封锁后时期每天花在会议上的时间减少了（-11.5%）。我们还发现平均工作日时长显著且持久地增加（+8.2%，即+48.5分钟），以及电子邮件活动的短期增加。这些发现从一个新颖的数据集提供了关于大量知识工作者工作性质如何变化的见解。我们结合组织和工人在全球疫情中努力适应和表现所面临的持续挑战，讨论了这些变化。

27611.title: Twenty Year Economic Impacts of Deworming
27611.zh_title: 驱虫治疗的二十年经济影响
27611.authors: Joan Hamory, Edward Miguel, Michael W. Walker, Michael Kremer, Sarah J. Baird
27611.abstract: This study exploits a randomized school health intervention that provided deworming treatment to Kenyan children and utilizes longitudinal data to estimate impacts on economic outcomes up to 20 years later. The effective respondent tracking rate was 84%. Individuals who received 2 to 3 additional years of childhood deworming experience an increase of 14% in consumption expenditure, 13% in hourly earnings, 9% in non-agricultural work hours, and are 9% more likely to live in urban areas. Most effects are concentrated among males and older individuals. Given deworming's low cost, a conservative annualized social internal rate of return estimate is 37%.
27611.zh_abstract: 本研究利用一项随机学校健康干预措施，该措施为肯尼亚儿童提供驱虫治疗，并利用纵向数据估计长达20年后对经济结果的影响。有效的受访者追踪率为84%。接受2至3年额外儿童期驱虫治疗的个体，其消费支出增加14%，小时收入增加13%，非农业工作时间增加9%，并且居住在城市地区的可能性增加9%。大多数影响集中在男性和年龄较大的个体中。鉴于驱虫治疗成本低廉，保守估计的年化社会内部收益率为37%。
27611.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH, LS；JEL：I15, J24, O15

27610.title: A Dynamic Theory of Lending Standards
27610.authors: Michael J. Fishman, Jonathan A. Parker, Ludwig Straub
27610.abstract: We analyze a dynamic credit market where banks choose lending standards, modeled as costly effort to screen out bad borrowers. Tighter standards worsen the borrower pool, increasing banks’ incentives to employ tight standards in the future. This dynamic complementarity in lending standards can amplify and prolong downturns, decreasing lending and increasing credit spreads. Because lending standards have negative externalities, the market can converge to a steady state with inefficiently tight lending standards. We discuss the role of optimal policy to avoid this outcome as well as the impact of balance sheet costs on lending standards.
27610.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一个动态信贷市场，其中银行选择贷款标准，建模为筛选出不良借款人的成本性努力。更严格的标准会恶化借款人池，增加银行未来采用严格标准的激励。这种贷款标准中的动态互补性可以放大和延长经济低迷，减少贷款并增加信用利差。由于贷款标准具有负外部性，市场可能收敛到一个贷款标准过于严格的无效率稳态。我们讨论了避免这种结果的最优政策的作用，以及资产负债表成本对贷款标准的影响。
27610.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D82, E51, G21

27609.title: At What Level Should One Cluster Standard Errors in Paired and Small-Strata Experiments?
27609.zh_title: 配对和小分层实验中标准误应在哪一层级聚类？
27609.abstract: In clustered paired experiments, randomization units, say villages, are matched into pairs, and one unit of each pair is randomly assigned to treatment. To estimate the treatment effect, researchers often regress their outcome on the treatment and pair fixed effects, clustering standard errors at the unit-of-randomization level. We show that the variance estimator in this regression may be severely downward biased: under constant treatment effect, its expectation equals 1/2 of the true variance. Instead, researchers should cluster at the pair level. Using simulations, we show that those results extend to clustered stratified experiments with few units per strata.
27609.zh_abstract: 在聚类配对实验中，随机化单位（例如村庄）被匹配成对，每对中的一个单位被随机分配接受处理。为了估计处理效应，研究者通常将结果变量对处理变量和配对固定效应进行回归，并在随机化单位层级对标准误进行聚类。我们证明，该回归中的方差估计量可能存在严重的向下偏误：在恒定处理效应下，其期望值仅为真实方差的一半。相反，研究者应在配对层级进行聚类。通过模拟，我们表明这些结果也适用于每层内单位数较少的聚类分层实验。
27609.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EH, LS, TWP；JEL：C01, C21

27608.title: Nursing Home Staff Networks and COVID-19
27608.authors: M. Keith Chen, Judith A. Chevalier, Elisa F. Long
27608.abstract: Nursing homes and other long-term care facilities account for a disproportionate share of COVID-19 cases and fatalities worldwide. Outbreaks in U.S. nursing homes have persisted despite nationwide visitor restrictions beginning in mid-March. An early report issued by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention identiﬁed staﬀ members working in multiple nursing homes as a likely source of spread from the Life Care Center in Kirkland, Washington to other skilled nursing facilities. The full extent of staﬀ connections between nursing homes—and the role these connections serve in spreading a highly contagious respiratory infection—is currently unknown given the lack of centralized data on cross-facility employment. We perform the ﬁrst large-scale analysis of nursing home connections via shared staﬀ and contractors using device-level geolocation data from 50 million smartphones, and ﬁnd that 5.1 percent of smartphone users who visit a nursing home for at least one hour also visit another facility during our 11-week study period—even after visitor restrictions were imposed. We construct network measures of connectedness and estimate that nursing homes, on average, share connections with 7 other facilities. Controlling for demographic and other factors, a home’s staﬀ-network connections and its centrality within the greater network strongly predict COVID-19 cases. Traditional federal regulatory metrics of nursing home quality are unimportant in predicting outbreaks, consistent with recent research. Multivariate regressions comparing demographically and geographically similar nursing homes suggest that 49 percent of COVID cases among nursing home residents are attributable to staﬀ movement between facilities.
27608.zh_abstract: 养老院和其他长期护理设施在全球COVID-19病例和死亡中占比过高。尽管美国从3月中旬开始实施全国性的访客限制，但养老院的疫情爆发持续存在。美国疾病控制与预防中心发布的一份早期报告指出，在多家养老院工作的员工可能是病毒从华盛顿州柯克兰的生命护理中心传播到其他专业护理机构的来源。由于缺乏跨设施就业的集中数据，养老院之间员工联系的全面程度——以及这些联系在传播高传染性呼吸道感染中的作用——目前尚不清楚。我们利用5000万部智能手机的设备级地理定位数据，首次对通过共享员工和承包商形成的养老院联系进行了大规模分析，发现即使在实施访客限制后，在我们11周的研究期间内，访问一家养老院至少一小时的智能手机用户中，有5.1%也访问了另一家设施。我们构建了连通性的网络指标，并估计养老院平均与7家其他设施共享联系。在控制人口统计和其他因素后，一家养老院的员工网络联系及其在更大网络中的中心性强烈预测了COVID-19病例。传统的联邦监管养老院质量指标在预测疫情爆发方面并不重要，这与近期研究一致。对人口统计和地理位置相似的养老院进行多元回归分析表明，养老院居民中49%的COVID-19病例可归因于员工在设施间的流动。

27607.title: Regulatory Arbitrage in Teacher Hiring and Retention: Evidence from Massachusetts Charter Schools
27607.zh_title: 教师招聘与留任中的监管套利：来自马萨诸塞州特许学校的证据
27607.authors: Jesse M. Bruhn, Scott A. Imberman, Marcus A. Winters
27607.abstract: We study personnel flexibility in charter schools by exploring how teacher retention varies with teacher and school quality in Massachusetts. Charters are more likely to lose their highest and lowest value-added teachers. Low performers tend to exit public education, while high performers tend to switch to traditional public schools. To rationalize these findings, we propose a model in which educators with high fixed-costs use charter schools to explore teaching careers before obtaining licenses required for higher paying public sector jobs. The model suggests charter schools create positive externalities for traditional public schools by increasing the average quality of available teachers.
27607.zh_abstract: 我们通过探索马萨诸塞州教师留任率如何随教师和学校质量变化，来研究特许学校的人员灵活性。特许学校更有可能流失其增值最高和最低的教师。表现不佳的教师倾向于退出公立教育，而表现优异的教师则倾向于转到传统公立学校。为了合理化这些发现，我们提出了一个模型，其中具有高固定成本的教育工作者利用特许学校探索教学生涯，然后获得更高薪酬的公共部门工作所需的执照。该模型表明，特许学校通过提高可用教师的平均质量，为传统公立学校创造了正外部性。

27606.title: Challenges of Change: An Experiment Promoting Women to Managerial Roles in the Bangladeshi Garment Sector
27606.zh_title: 变革的挑战：促进孟加拉国服装行业女性担任管理职位的实验
27606.authors: Rocco Macchiavello, Andreas Menzel, Atonu Rabbani, Christopher Woodruff
27606.abstract: Women remain disadvantaged in access to management positions around the world. We conduct a field experiment with 24 large garment factories in Bangladesh to test for inefficient representation of women among line supervisors. We identify the marginal female and male candidates for supervisory positions and randomly assign them to manage production lines. Three sets of results emerge: (i) extensive diagnostic testing at baseline reveal few skill differences between marginal female and male supervisor candidates; (ii) initially, marginal female candidates have lower productivity and evaluations from sub-ordinate workers, though after four to six months, these gaps disappear; and (iii) the share of the female candidates retained as line supervisor after the trial is significantly higher than the share of female supervisors in the factories at baseline. This suggests that factories previously promoted fewer women than would have been optimal. Additional surveys and a lab-in-the-field experiment suggest that the initially worse performance stems from negative beliefs of workers about the abilities of female supervisors.
27606.zh_abstract: 在全球范围内，女性在获得管理职位方面仍然处于不利地位。我们在孟加拉国的24家大型服装厂进行了一项实地实验，以检验生产线主管中女性代表性不足的低效现象。我们识别出主管职位的边缘女性和男性候选人，并随机分配他们管理生产线。三组结果显现：（i）基线时的广泛诊断测试显示，边缘女性和男性主管候选人之间的技能差异很小；（ii）最初，边缘女性候选人的生产力和来自下属工人的评价较低，但四到六个月后，这些差距消失；（iii）试验后留任为生产线主管的女性候选人比例显著高于工厂基线时女性主管的比例。这表明工厂之前提拔的女性人数少于最优水平。额外的调查和一项实验室实地实验表明，最初较差的表现源于工人对女性主管能力的负面信念。
27606.meta: Programs：DEV, PR；JEL：J16, J71, M51, M54, O14, O15

27605.title: Startups, Unicorns, and the Local Inflow of Inventors
27605.zh_title: 初创企业、独角兽企业与发明家的本地流入
27605.authors: Benjamin Balsmeier, Lee Fleming, Matt Marx, Seungryul Ryan Shin
27605.abstract: We provide evidence that the arrival of technical human capital improves regional entrepreneurship, both by increasing firm entry and reducing failure. The results also indicate negative externalities upon low-tech and competing industries: the arrival of inventors in a county shifts the locus of venture capital investment away from low-tech startups to high-tech startups and moreover towards new ventures in the same sector as those inventors’ skills. Identification is provided by a shift-share instrument combining the spatial distribution of surnames in the 1940 U.S. Census with thousands of surname-specific shifts based on modern inventor mobility.
27605.zh_abstract: 我们提供的证据表明，技术人力资本的到来改善了区域创业活动，既通过增加企业进入，也通过减少企业失败。结果还表明，对低技术和竞争性行业存在负外部性：发明家进入一个县，会将风险资本投资的焦点从低技术初创企业转向高技术初创企业，并且进一步转向与这些发明家技能相同行业的新企业。识别方法是通过一个结合1940年美国人口普查中姓氏空间分布与基于现代发明家流动性的数千个特定姓氏变化的份额转移工具变量提供的。

27604.title: COVID-19 Prevention and Air Pollution in the Absence of a Lockdown
27604.zh_title: 无封锁情况下的COVID-19预防与空气污染
27604.authors: Hung-Hao Chang, Chad Meyerhoefer, Feng-An Yang
27604.abstract: Recent studies demonstrate that air quality improved during the coronavirus pandemic due to the imposition of social lockdowns. We investigate the impact of COVID-19 on air pollution in the two largest cities in Taiwan, which were not subject to economic or mobility restrictions. Using a generalized difference-in-differences approach and real-time data on air quality and transportation, we estimate that levels of sulfur dioxide, nitrogen dioxide and particulate matter increased 5 - 12 percent relative to 2017 - 2019. We demonstrate that this counterintuitive finding is likely due to a shift in preferences for mode of transport away from public transportation and towards personal automobiles. Similar COVID-19 prevention behaviors in regions or countries emerging from lockdowns could likewise result in an increase in air pollution.
27604.zh_abstract: 近期研究表明，由于实施社会封锁，冠状病毒大流行期间空气质量有所改善。我们调查了COVID-19对台湾两个最大城市空气污染的影响，这些城市未受到经济或出行限制。使用广义双重差分方法和空气质量与交通的实时数据，我们估计二氧化硫、二氧化氮和颗粒物的水平相对于2017-2019年增加了5%至12%。我们证明，这一反直觉的发现很可能是由于出行方式偏好从公共交通转向私家车所致。在解除封锁的地区或国家，类似的COVID-19预防行为同样可能导致空气污染增加。

27603.title: Co-Benefits and Regulatory Impact Analysis: Theory and Evidence from Federal Air Quality Regulations
27603.zh_title: 协同效益与监管影响分析：来自联邦空气质量法规的理论与证据
27603.authors: Joseph E. Aldy, Matthew Kotchen, Mary F. Evans, Meredith Fowlie, Arik Levinson, Karen Palmer
27603.abstract: This paper considers the treatment of co-benefits in benefit-cost analysis of federal air quality regulations. Using a comprehensive data set on all major Clean Air Act rules issued by the Environmental Protection Agency over the period 1997-2019, we show that (1) co-benefits make up a significant share of the monetized benefits; (2) among the categories of co-benefits, those associated with reductions in fine particulate matter are the most significant; and (3) co-benefits have been pivotal to the quantified net benefit calculation in exactly half of cases. Motivated by these trends, we develop a simple conceptual framework that illustrates a critical point: co-benefits are simply a semantic category of benefits that should be included in benefit-cost analyses. We also address common concerns about whether the inclusion of co-benefits is problematic because of alternative regulatory approaches that may be more cost-effective and the possibility for double counting.
27603.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了联邦空气质量法规成本效益分析中协同效益的处理方式。利用1997-2019年间美国环境保护署发布的所有主要《清洁空气法》规则的全面数据集，我们表明：（1）协同效益在货币化效益中占显著份额；（2）在协同效益类别中，与细颗粒物减少相关的效益最为显著；（3）在恰好一半的案例中，协同效益对量化的净效益计算起到了关键作用。受这些趋势的启发，我们开发了一个简单的概念框架，阐明了一个关键点：协同效益仅仅是效益的一个语义类别，应纳入成本效益分析。我们还回应了关于纳入协同效益是否因可能存在更具成本效益的替代监管方法以及重复计算的可能性而产生问题的常见担忧。

27602.title: Designing Disability Insurance Reforms: Tightening Eligibility Rules or Reducing Benefits
27602.zh_title: 设计残疾保险改革：收紧资格规则还是降低福利
27602.authors: Andreas Haller, Stefan Staubli, Josef Zweimüller
27602.abstract: We study the welfare effects of disability insurance (DI) and derive social-optimality conditions for the two main DI policy parameters: (i) DI eligibility rules and (ii) DI benefits. Causal evidence from two DI reforms in Austria generate fiscal multipliers (total over mechanical cost reductions) of 2.0-2.5 for stricter DI eligibility rules and of 1.3-1.4 for lower DI benefits. Stricter DI eligibility rules generate lower income losses (earnings + transfers), particularly at the lower end of the income distribution. Our analysis suggests that the welfare cost of rolling back the Austrian DI program is lower through tightening eligibility rules than through lowering benefits. Applying our framework to the US DI system suggests that both loosening eligibility rules, and increasing benefits, would be welfare increasing.
27602.zh_abstract: 我们研究残疾保险的福利效应，并推导出两个主要DI政策参数的社会最优条件：（i）DI资格规则和（ii）DI福利。来自奥地利两项DI改革的因果证据显示，更严格的DI资格规则的财政乘数（总效应相对于机械成本减少）为2.0-2.5，而降低DI福利的财政乘数为1.3-1.4。更严格的DI资格规则导致更低的收入损失（收入+转移支付），特别是在收入分布的较低端。我们的分析表明，通过收紧资格规则来缩减奥地利DI项目的福利成本低于通过降低福利。将我们的框架应用于美国DI系统表明，放宽资格规则和增加福利都将提高福利。
27602.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：H53, H55, J14, J21, J65

27601.title: The Risk of Being a Fallen Angel and the Corporate Dash for Cash in the Midst of COVID
27601.zh_title: 沦为堕落天使的风险与COVID-19期间企业的现金争夺战
27601.abstract: Data on firm-loan-level daily credit line drawdowns in the United States expose a corporate “dash for cash” induced by the COVID-19 pandemic. In the first phase of the crisis, which was characterized by extreme precaution and heightened aggregate risk, all firms drew down bank credit lines and raised cash levels. In the second phase, which followed the adoption of stabilization policies, only the highest-rated firms switched to capital markets to raise cash. Consistent with the risk of becoming a fallen angel, the lowest-quality BBB-rated firms behaved more similarly to non-investment grade firms. The observed corporate behavior reveals the significant impact of credit risk on corporate cash holdings.
27601.zh_abstract: 基于美国企业-贷款层面每日信贷额度提取的数据，揭示了COVID-19疫情引发的企业“现金争夺战”。在危机第一阶段，其特征是极端的预防行为和加剧的总体风险，所有企业都提取银行信贷额度并提高现金水平。在第二阶段，即稳定政策实施之后，只有最高评级的企业转向资本市场筹集现金。与沦为堕落天使的风险一致，质量最低的BBB级企业表现得更像非投资级企业。观察到的企业行为揭示了信用风险对企业现金持有的显著影响。

27600.title: Randomization in the Tropics Revisited: a Theme and Eleven Variations
27600.zh_title: 热带地区随机化再审视：一个主题与十一种变体
27600.abstract: Randomized controlled trials have been used in economics for 50 years, and intensively in economic development for more than 20. There has been a great deal of useful work, but RCTs have no unique advantages or disadvantages over other empirical methods in economics. They do not simplify inference, nor can an RCT establish causality. Many of the difficulties were recognized and explored in economics 30 years ago, but are sometimes forgotten. I review some of the most relevant issues here. The most troubling questions concern ethics, especially when very poor people are experimented on. Finding out what works, even if such a thing is possible, is in itself a deeply inadequate basis for policy
27600.zh_abstract: 随机对照试验在经济学中已使用50年，在经济发展领域密集使用超过20年。已有大量有价值的工作，但RCT相对于经济学中的其他实证方法并无独特优势或劣势。它们不能简化推断，也无法确立因果关系。许多困难在30年前的经济学中已被认识和探讨，但有时被遗忘。本文回顾了一些最相关的问题。最令人不安的问题涉及伦理，尤其是在对非常贫困的人群进行实验时。发现什么有效，即使这是可能的，其本身作为政策基础也远远不够。

27666.title: The $100 Million Nudge: Increasing Tax Compliance of Businesses and the Self-Employed using a Natural Field Experiment
27666.zh_title: 一亿美元的助推：通过自然实地实验提升企业和自雇人士的税收合规性
27666.authors: Justin E. Holz, John A. List, Alejandro Zentner, Marvin Cardoza, Joaquin Zentner
27666.abstract: This paper uses a natural field experiment to examine the effectiveness of specific nudges on tax compliance amongst firms and the self-employed in the Dominican Republic. In collaboration with the Dominican Republic’s tax authority, we designed messages for more than 28,000 self-employed workers and over 56,000 firms. Leveraging administrative tax data, we find evidence that our nudges (increasing the salience of prison sentences or public disclosure of tax evaders) have large effects on increasing tax compliance, primarily working through the channel of decreasing claimed tax exemptions. Interestingly, we find that firms are more impacted than the self-employed, and that firm size is critically linked to nudge effectiveness: larger firms are considerably more influenced by nudges than smaller firms. We find this latter result noteworthy given the paucity of evidence showing significant behavioral impacts of nudges amongst the largest players in a market. Overall, our messages increased tax revenue by $\$193$ million (roughly 0.23% of the Dominican Republic’s GDP in 2018), with over $\$100$ million constituting income that the government would not have received without our field experimental nudges.
27666.zh_abstract: 本文利用自然实地实验，研究了特定助推措施对多米尼加共和国企业和自雇人士税收合规性的有效性。我们与多米尼加共和国税务机关合作，为超过28,000名自雇工人和56,000多家企业设计了信息提示。借助行政税收数据，我们发现这些助推措施（提高监禁刑罚或公开曝光逃税者的显著性）对提升税收合规性产生了显著效果，主要通过减少申报的税收豁免这一渠道发挥作用。有趣的是，我们发现企业比自雇人士受到的影响更大，并且企业规模与助推效果密切相关：大型企业比小型企业更显著地受到助推的影响。鉴于缺乏证据表明助推对市场中最大参与者有显著行为影响，我们认为后一个结果值得关注。总体而言，我们的信息提示增加了1.93亿美元的税收收入（约占2018年多米尼加共和国GDP的0.23%），其中超过1亿美元是如果没有我们的实地实验助推，政府本不会收到的收入。

27665.title: Valuing Long-Term Property Rights with Anticipated Political Regime Shifts
27665.zh_title: 在预期政治体制转变下评估长期产权价值
27665.authors: Zhiguo He, Maggie Rong Hu, Zhenping Wang, Vincent Yao
27665.abstract: We identify exposure to political risk by exploiting a unique variation around land lease extension protection after 2047 in Hong Kong's housing market due to historical arrangements under the “One Country, Two Systems” design. Relative to properties that have been promised an extension protection, those with legally unprotected leases granted by the current government are sold at a substantial discount of around 8%, and those with colonial leases suffer an additional discount of about 8%. Incorporating estimated structural parameters that suggest an additional 20% ground rent after 2047, our model matches these empirical discounts well across long-term lease horizons. We find that the discount increases as time approaches 2047 and is higher in areas where residents feel more pessimistic about the city's future.
27665.zh_abstract: 我们通过利用香港住房市场中因“一国两制”设计下的历史安排而导致的2047年后土地租约延期保护的特殊差异，识别了政治风险暴露。与已承诺延期保护的房产相比，由现政府授予的、法律上未受保护的租约房产以约8%的显著折扣出售，而殖民租约房产则额外遭受约8%的折扣。结合估计的结构参数（表明2047年后地租增加20%），我们的模型在长期租约期限内很好地匹配了这些经验折扣。我们发现，随着时间接近2047年，折扣增加，并且在居民对城市未来感到更悲观的地区，折扣更高。
27665.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, LE, POL；JEL：G11, G12, G18, K25, N25, O53, P26, R30

27664.title: Reconciling Trends in U.S. Male Earnings Volatility: Results from a Four Data Set Project
27664.zh_title: 调和美国男性收入波动趋势：来自四个数据集项目的结果
27664.abstract: There is a large literature on earnings and income volatility in labor economics, household finance, and macroeconomics. One strand of that literature has studied whether individual earnings volatility has risen or fallen in the U.S. over the last several decades. There are strong disagreements in the empirical literature on this important question, with some studies showing upward trends, some downward trends, and some flat trends. Some studies have suggested that the differences are the result of using flawed survey data instead of more accurate administrative data. This paper provides an overview of a project attempting to reconcile these findings with four different data sets and six different data series--three survey and three administrative data series, including two which match survey respondent data to their administrative data. Using common specifications, measures of volatility, and other treatments of the data, the papers show almost uniformly a lack of any significant long-term trend in male earnings volatility over the last 30 years. Moreover, the survey and the administrative data almost entirely agree on that long-term stability when the comparison is done properly. Several possible explanations for the differing finds in past work are suggested by the papers. The stability of earnings volatility raises many questions for future research on trends in the U.S. labor market.
27664.zh_abstract: 在劳动经济学、家庭金融和宏观经济学中，关于收入和收入波动性的文献众多。其中一支文献研究了美国过去几十年中个人收入波动性是上升还是下降。在这个重要问题上，实证文献存在严重分歧，一些研究显示上升趋势，一些显示下降趋势，还有一些显示平稳趋势。一些研究认为，这些差异源于使用有缺陷的调查数据而非更准确的行政数据。本文概述了一个项目，试图用四个不同的数据集和六个不同的数据序列（三个调查数据序列和三个行政数据序列，包括两个将调查受访者数据与其行政数据匹配的序列）来调和这些发现。使用共同的规格、波动性度量和其他数据处理方式，这些论文几乎一致显示，在过去30年中，男性收入波动性缺乏任何显著的长期趋势。此外，当进行适当比较时，调查数据和行政数据在长期稳定性上几乎完全一致。这些论文提出了过去研究中不同发现的几种可能解释。收入波动性的稳定性为未来关于美国劳动力市场趋势的研究提出了许多问题。

27663.title: The Missing Inflation Puzzle: The Role of the Wage-Price Pass-Through
27663.zh_title: 缺失的通胀之谜：工资-价格传导的作用
27663.authors: Sebastian Heise, Fatih Karahan, Ayşegül Şahin
27663.abstract: Price inflation in the U.S. has been sluggish and slow to pick up in the last two decades. We show that this missing inflation can be traced to a growing disconnect between unemployment and core goods inflation. We exploit rich industry-level data to show that weakening pass-through from wages to prices in the goods-producing sector is an important source of the slow inflation pick-up in the last two decades. We set up a theoretical framework where markups and pass-through are a function of firms' market shares and show that increased import competition and rising market concentration reduce pass-through from wages to prices. We then use industry-level data and find strong support for these two channels consistent with the implications of our model.
27663.zh_abstract: 美国的价格通胀在过去二十年中一直低迷且难以回升。我们表明，这种缺失的通胀可以追溯到失业与核心商品通胀之间日益脱节的关系。我们利用丰富的行业层面数据来证明，商品生产部门中工资向价格传导的减弱是过去二十年通胀缓慢回升的重要来源。我们建立了一个理论框架，其中加价和传导是企业市场份额的函数，并表明进口竞争加剧和市场集中度上升会降低工资向价格的传导。然后，我们使用行业层面数据，发现了支持这两个渠道的有力证据，这与我们模型的含义一致。

27662.title: Informational Barriers to Market Access: Experimental Evidence from Liberian Firms
27662.zh_title: 市场准入的信息障碍：来自利比里亚企业的实验证据
27662.authors: Jonas Hjort, Golvine de Rochambeau, Vinayak Iyer, Fei Ao
27662.abstract: Evidence suggests that many firms in lower-income countries stagnate because they cannot access growth-conducive markets. We hypothesize that overlooked informational barriers distort market access, excluding productive but “information-poor” suppliers. To investigate, we gave a random subset of medium-sized Liberian firms vouchers for a week-long program targeting equal-opportunity access to the input purchases of government, companies, and other organizations—a market that makes up upwards of 80 percent of global GDP. The program exclusively teaches “sellership”: how to navigate large buyers’ complex, formal sourcing procedures. Firms that participate win three times as many formal contracts a year later. The impact is heterogeneous: informational sales barriers bind for about a quarter of Liberian firms. Three years post-training, these firms continue to win desirable contracts, are more likely to operate, and employ more workers. We use a simple model of managers’ time-constraints to illustrate a possible explanation for why informational market access barriers can persist and generate poverty-trap-like dynamics among firms, even absent credit constraints. Our results help rationalize common demand-side policies in public procurement that nonetheless appear to scratch at the surface of a bigger distortion.
27662.zh_abstract: 有证据表明，许多低收入国家的企业因无法进入促进增长的市场而停滞不前。我们假设，被忽视的信息障碍扭曲了市场准入，排除了有生产力但“信息贫乏”的供应商。为了调查这一点，我们向随机抽取的利比里亚中型企业提供了为期一周的培训券，该培训旨在促进平等机会地进入政府、公司和其他组织的采购市场——这个市场占全球GDP的80%以上。该培训专门教授“销售技巧”：如何应对大型买家复杂、正式的采购程序。参与的企业一年后赢得的正式合同数量是原来的三倍。影响是异质性的：信息销售障碍制约了约四分之一的利比里亚企业。培训三年后，这些企业继续赢得理想的合同，更有可能持续运营，并雇佣更多工人。我们使用一个简单的管理者时间约束模型，来说明为什么信息市场准入障碍可能持续存在并在企业中产生类似贫困陷阱的动态，即使没有信贷约束。我们的结果有助于解释公共采购中常见的需求侧政策，这些政策似乎只是触及了更大扭曲的表面。

27661.title: The Effect of Mentoring on School Attendance and Academic Outcomes: A Randomized Evaluation of the Check & Connect Program
27661.zh_title: 辅导对学生出勤和学业成果的影响：Check & Connect项目的随机评估
27661.authors: Jonathan Guryan, Sandra Christenson, Ashley Cureton, Ijun Lai, Jens Ludwig, Catherine Schwarz, Emma Shirey, Mary Clair Turner
27661.abstract: In response to budget problems, many urban school systems reduced resources for getting students to come to school, like truancy officers. Chicago, for instance, went from 150 truancy officers down to, in 1991, a total of zero. Is that a good idea? We explore here the effects of increased support by a pro-social adult, or “social capital,” delivered through a structured student monitoring and mentoring program called Check & Connect (C&C). We carried out a large-scale randomized controlled trial with C&C in partnership with the Chicago Public Schools (CPS) to students in grades 1-8. Program participation decreased absences in grades 5-7 by 4.2 days, or 22.9 percent, but with no detectable effects on students in grades 1-4. We also did not find statistically significant effects on learning outcomes such as test scores or GPA, or any detectable spillovers to other students within the schools where the program was administered. The modest impacts per dollar spent, compared to previous evidence on either low-cost "nudges" or relatively intensive, higher-cost interventions, raise the possibility that, for very disadvantaged students, there may be decreasing but then increasing returns to program intensity for the problem of student disengagement.
27661.zh_abstract: 为了应对预算问题，许多城市学校系统减少了用于让学生上学的资源，例如逃学官员。例如，芝加哥从150名逃学官员减少到1991年的零。这是个好主意吗？我们在此探讨通过一个名为Check & Connect（C&C）的结构化学生监测和辅导项目，由亲社会成年人提供的增强支持（或“社会资本”）的效果。我们与芝加哥公立学校（CPS）合作，对1-8年级的学生进行了一项大规模的C&C随机对照试验。项目参与使5-7年级学生的缺勤减少了4.2天，即22.9%，但对1-4年级学生没有检测到显著影响。我们也没有发现对学习成绩（如考试成绩或GPA）有统计上显著的影响，或者对项目所在学校内其他学生有任何可检测的溢出效应。与先前关于低成本“助推”或相对密集、高成本干预的证据相比，每美元支出的影响适中，这提出了一个可能性：对于非常弱势的学生，针对学生脱离问题，项目强度可能存在递减但随后递增的回报。

27660.title: This Time It's Different: The Role of Women's Employment in a Pandemic Recession
27660.zh_title: 这次不同：女性就业在大流行衰退中的作用
27660.authors: Titan Alon, Matthias Doepke, Jane Olmstead-Rumsey, Michèle Tertilt
27660.abstract: In recent US recessions, employment losses have been much larger for men than for women. Yet, in the current recession caused by the Covid-19 pandemic, the opposite is true: unemployment is higher among women. In this paper, we analyze the causes and consequences of this phenomenon. We argue that women have experienced sharp employment losses both because their employment is concentrated in heavily affected sectors such as restaurants, and due to increased childcare needs caused by school and daycare closures, preventing many women from working. We analyze the repercussions of this trend using a quantitative macroeconomic model featuring heterogeneity in gender, marital status, childcare needs, and human capital. Our quantitative analysis suggests that a pandemic recession will i) feature a strong transmission from employment to aggregate demand due to diminished within-household insurance; ii) result in a widening of the gender wage gap throughout the recovery; and iii) contribute to a weakening of the gender norms that currently produce a lopsided distribution of the division of labor in home work and childcare.
27660.zh_abstract: 在近期的美国经济衰退中，男性的就业损失远大于女性。然而，在由新冠疫情引发的当前衰退中，情况正好相反：女性的失业率更高。在本文中，我们分析了这一现象的原因和后果。我们认为，女性经历了严重的就业损失，既因为她们的就业集中在受严重影响行业（如餐馆），也因为学校和日托中心关闭导致育儿需求增加，使许多女性无法工作。我们使用一个定量宏观经济模型分析这一趋势的影响，该模型具有性别、婚姻状况、育儿需求和人力资本的异质性。我们的定量分析表明，大流行衰退将i）由于家庭内部保险减少，呈现出从就业到总需求的强传导；ii）导致整个复苏过程中性别工资差距扩大；以及iii）有助于削弱当前导致家务劳动和育儿分工不平衡的性别规范。

27659.title: Does FinTech Substitute for Banks? Evidence from the Paycheck Protection Program
27659.zh_title: 金融科技是否替代了银行？来自薪资保护计划的证据
27659.abstract: New technology promises to expand the supply of ﬁnancial services to small businesses poorly served by the banking system. Does it succeed? We study the response of FinTech to ﬁnancial services demand created by the introduction of the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP). We ﬁnd that FinTech is disproportionately used in ZIP codes with fewer bank branches, lower incomes, and a larger minority share of the population, as well as in industries with little ex ante small-business lending. FinTech’s role in PPP provision is also greater in counties where the economic eﬀects of the COVID-19 pandemic were more severe. We estimate that more PPP provision by traditional banks causes statistically signiﬁcant but economically small substitution away from FinTechs, implying that FinTech mostly expands the overall supply of ﬁnancial services, rather than redistributing it.
27659.zh_abstract: 新技术承诺扩大对银行系统服务不足的小企业的金融服务供应。它成功了吗？我们研究了金融科技对薪资保护计划（PPP）引入所创造的金融服务需求的反应。我们发现，金融科技在银行分支机构较少、收入较低、少数族裔人口比例较大的邮政编码区，以及在事前小企业贷款很少的行业中，被不成比例地使用。金融科技在PPP提供中的作用在新冠疫情经济影响更严重的县也更大。我们估计，传统银行提供更多PPP会导致金融科技的使用出现统计上显著但经济上微小的替代，这意味着金融科技主要扩大了金融服务的总体供应，而不是重新分配它。
27659.meta: Programs：CF；JEL：G00, G01, G2, G21, G23, G28, H12, H2, H3

27658.title: Taking It to the Limit: Effects of Increased Student Loan Availability on Attainment, Earnings, and Financial Well-Being
27658.zh_title: 极限挑战：增加学生贷款可获得性对学业成就、收入及财务福祉的影响
27658.authors: Sandra E. Black, Jeffrey T. Denning, Lisa J. Dettling, Sarena Goodman, Lesley J. Turner
27658.abstract: Growing reliance on student loans and repayment difficulties have raised concerns of a student debt crisis in the United States, but little is known about the effects of student borrowing on human capital and long‐run financial well‐being. We use variation induced by recent expansions in federal loan limits combined with administrative datasets to identify the effects of increased access to student loans on credit‐constrained students’ educational attainment, earnings, debt, and loan repayment. Increased student loan availability raises student debt and improves degree completion, later‐life earnings, and student loan repayment while having no effect on homeownership or other types of debt.
27658.zh_abstract: 美国对学生贷款的日益依赖以及还款困难引发了关于学生债务危机的担忧，但学生借贷对人力资本和长期财务福祉的影响尚不明确。我们利用近期联邦贷款限额扩大带来的变化，结合行政数据集，识别增加学生贷款可获得性对信贷受限学生教育成就、收入、债务和贷款偿还的影响。增加学生贷款可获得性提高了学生债务，改善了学位完成率、后期收入和学生贷款偿还情况，同时对住房拥有率或其他类型债务没有影响。
27658.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：D14, H52, H81, I21, I22, I23, I26, I28, J24

27657.title: Staggered Price Indexation
27657.abstract: Empirical studies using micro data find that about two thirds of all product prices do not change in a given quarter. This evidence has been interpreted as indicating the absence of price indexation. Further, models of staggered price setting without indexation interpret all price changes as optimal. However, the empirical evidence is mute with regard to whether price changes are optimal or not. To reconcile the possibility of price indexation with the micro evidence on the frequency of price changes, I modify the Calvo sticky price model by allowing each period a fraction of randomly picked prices to change optimally, another fraction of randomly picked prices to change due to indexation, and the remaining prices to be constant. The paper presents five main findings: (1) with staggered price indexation the Phillips curve includes a state variable that carries information about all past inflation rates; (2) as the degree of staggered price indexation increases, the Phillips curve becomes flatter; (3) staggered indexation dampens the short-run effect of monetary policy on inflation and amplifies its effect on output; (4) fixing the probability of a price change to 33% per quarter (in accordance with the empirical evidence), a small-scale new-Keynesian model estimated on U.S. data yields a probability of indexation of 19% per quarter (and therefore a probability of an optimal price change of 14% per quarter); and (5) according to the estimated model, staggered indexation explains more than half of the observed persistence of inflation in the United States.
27657.zh_abstract: 使用微观数据的实证研究发现，在给定季度内，约三分之二的产品价格没有变化。这一证据被解释为表明不存在价格指数化。此外，没有指数化的交错价格设定模型将所有价格变化解释为最优调整。然而，实证证据并未说明价格变化是否最优。为了调和价格指数化的可能性与价格变化频率的微观证据，我修改了卡尔沃粘性价格模型，允许每个时期随机选取的一部分价格进行最优调整，另一部分随机选取的价格因指数化而变动，其余价格保持不变。本文提出五个主要发现：（1）在交错价格指数化下，菲利普斯曲线包含一个携带所有历史通胀率信息的状态变量；（2）随着交错价格指数化程度的提高，菲利普斯曲线变得更加平坦；（3）交错指数化减弱了货币政策对通胀的短期影响，并放大了其对产出的影响；（4）将每季度价格变化概率固定为33%（与实证证据一致），基于美国数据估计的小规模新凯恩斯模型得出每季度指数化概率为19%（因此每季度最优价格变化概率为14%）；（5）根据估计模型，交错指数化解释了美国通胀持续性的半数以上。

27656.title: Dust Bowl Migrants: Identifying an Archetype
27656.zh_title: 沙尘暴移民：识别一个原型
27656.abstract: The 1930's American Dust Bowl created archetypal "Dust Bowl migrants," refugees from environmental collapse and economic upheaval. I examine this archetype, comparing migration from more-eroded counties and less-eroded counties to distinguish Dust Bowl migrants from other migrants in this era. Migrants from more-eroded counties were more "negatively selected," in years of education, than other migrants who were "positively selected." These Dust Bowl migrants struggled economically, especially in California. Despite migrants' struggles, however, I estimate strikingly modest impacts of the Dust Bowl on average incomes that contrast with its enduring impacts on agricultural land.
27656.zh_abstract: 20世纪30年代的美国沙尘暴创造了典型的“沙尘暴移民”，即环境崩溃和经济动荡的难民。我考察了这一原型，通过比较来自侵蚀更严重县和侵蚀较轻县的移民，以区分沙尘暴移民与同时期的其他移民。来自侵蚀更严重县的移民在教育年限方面比其他“正向选择”的移民更具“负向选择”特征。这些沙尘暴移民在经济上挣扎，尤其是在加利福尼亚州。然而，尽管移民面临困境，我估计沙尘暴对平均收入的冲击出奇地温和，这与它对农业用地的持久影响形成对比。

27655.title: Book-to-Market, Mispricing, and the Cross-Section of Corporate Bond Returns
27655.zh_title: 账面市值比、错误定价与公司债券收益的横截面
27655.authors: Söhnke M. Bartram, Mark Grinblatt, Yoshio Nozawa
27655.abstract: Methodological insights generating comprehensive transaction-based bond datasets reveal that corporate bonds’ book-to-market ratios predict returns from prices transacted days after signal observation. Senior bonds (even investment-grade) with the 20% highest ratios outperform the 20% lowest by 3%–4% annually after non-parametrically controlling for numerous liquidity, default, microstructure, and priced-risk attributes: yield-to-maturity, structural model equity hedges, bid-ask-spread, duration/maturity, credit spread/rating, past returns, coupon, size, age, and industry. Spreads for all-bond samples are larger. An efficient bond market would not exhibit the observed decay in the ratio’s predictive efficacy with implementation delays, smaller yield-to-maturity spreads, or similar-sized spreads across differing liquidity/de-fault bond-types.
27655.zh_abstract: 生成基于交易的全面债券数据集的方法论见解表明，公司债券的账面市值比能够预测信号观察后数天交易价格所反映的收益。在非参数控制众多流动性、违约、微观结构和定价风险属性（如到期收益率、结构性模型股权对冲、买卖价差、久期/期限、信用利差/评级、历史收益、票息、规模、年龄和行业）后，账面市值比最高20%的优先债券（甚至投资级）每年比最低20%的债券表现高出3%-4%。全债券样本的利差更大。一个有效的债券市场不会表现出该比率预测效能在实施延迟、较小的到期收益率利差或不同流动性/违约债券类型间相似规模利差下的衰减。

27654.title: To What Extent Are Tariffs Offset By Exchange Rates?
27654.zh_title: 关税在多大程度上被汇率抵消？
27654.abstract: In theory, we should expect tariffs to be partially offset by a currency appreciation in the tariff-imposing country or by a depreciation in the country on which the tariff is imposed. We find, based on a calibrated model, that the tariffs imposed by the US in 2018-19 should not have had a large impact on the dollar but may have significantly depreciated the renminbi. This prediction is consistent with a high-frequency event analysis looking at the impact of tariff-related news on the dollar and the renminbi. We find that tariffs explained at most one fifth of the dollar effective appreciation but around two thirds of the renminbi effective depreciation observed in 2018-19.
27654.zh_abstract: 理论上，我们预期关税会被征收关税国家的货币升值或被征收关税国家的货币贬值部分抵消。基于一个校准模型，我们发现美国在2018-19年征收的关税不应大幅影响美元，但可能显著使人民币贬值。这一预测与高频事件分析结果一致，该分析考察了关税相关新闻对美元和人民币的影响。我们发现，关税最多解释了2018-19年观察到的美元有效升值的五分之一，但解释了人民币有效贬值的大约三分之二。

27653.title: Data Privacy and Temptation
27653.authors: Zhuang Liu, Michael Sockin, Wei Xiong
27653.abstract: This paper derives a preference for data privacy from consumers' temptation utility. This approach facilitates a welfare analysis of different data privacy regulations, such as the GDPR enacted by the European Union and the CCPA enacted by the state of California, when a fraction of the consumers may succumb to targeted advertising of temptation goods. While sharing consumer data with firms improves firms' matching efficiency of normal consumption goods, it also exposes weak-willed consumers to temptation goods. Despite that the GDPR and the CCPA give each consumer the choice to opt in or out of data sharing, these regulations may not provide sufficient protection for severely tempted consumers because of a negative externality in which the opt-in decision of some consumers reduces the anonymity of those who opt out. Our analysis also shows that the default choices instituted by the GDPR and the CCPA can lead to sharply different outcomes.
27653.zh_abstract: 本文从消费者的诱惑效用中推导出对数据隐私的偏好。这种方法有助于分析不同数据隐私法规（如欧盟颁布的GDPR和加利福尼亚州颁布的CCPA）的福利效应，当部分消费者可能屈服于诱惑商品的定向广告时。虽然与公司共享消费者数据提高了公司对正常消费品的匹配效率，但也使意志薄弱的消费者暴露于诱惑商品。尽管GDPR和CCPA赋予每个消费者选择加入或退出数据共享的权利，但这些法规可能无法为严重受诱惑的消费者提供充分保护，因为存在一种负外部性：一些消费者的选择加入行为降低了那些选择退出者的匿名性。我们的分析还表明，GDPR和CCPA设立的默认选择可能导致截然不同的结果。
27653.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, LE；JEL：D03, D62, M15

27652.title: Trade Flows and Fiscal Multipliers
27652.abstract: We present novel insights on the role of international trade following unanticipated government spending and income tax changes in a flexible exchange rate environment. In a simple two-country, two-good model, we show analytically that fiscal multipliers can be larger in economies more open to trade, even when fiscal expansions imply a trade deficit. Cross-country comovement can be positive or negative. Three factors determine how trade linkages affect fiscal multipliers: the relative import share of public and private goods, how the government finances its budget, and the currency invoicing of exports. A Bayesian prior-predictive analysis shows a quantitative international business-cycle model bears the same predictions. Estimating the model on Canadian and U.S. data, we find support for larger multipliers relative to a counterfactually closed economy and positive cross-country spillovers.
27652.zh_abstract: 我们提出了在灵活汇率环境下，政府支出和所得税意外变化后国际贸易作用的新见解。在一个简单的两国、两商品模型中，我们分析表明，即使财政扩张导致贸易逆差，更开放经济体的财政乘数也可能更大。跨国联动可以是正向或负向的。三个因素决定了贸易联系如何影响财政乘数：公共和私人商品的相对进口份额、政府如何为其预算融资以及出口的货币计价。贝叶斯先验预测分析表明，一个量化的国际商业周期模型具有相同的预测。基于加拿大和美国数据估计该模型，我们发现相对于反事实的封闭经济，存在更大的乘数以及正向的跨国溢出效应。

27651.title: Who Voted for Trump? Populism and Social Capital
27651.zh_title: 谁投票给了特朗普？民粹主义与社会资本
27651.abstract: We argue that low levels of social capital are conducive to the electoral success of populist movements. Using a variety of data sources for the 2016 US Presidential election at the county and individual levels, we show that social capital, measured either by the density of memberships in civic, religious and sports organizations or by generalized trust, is significantly negatively correlated with the vote share and favorability rating of Donald Trump around the time of the election.
27651.zh_abstract: 我们认为，低水平的社会资本有利于民粹主义运动的选举成功。利用2016年美国总统选举的县级和个体层面多种数据来源，我们表明，社会资本（无论是通过公民、宗教和体育组织的成员密度还是普遍信任来衡量）与选举前后唐纳德·特朗普的得票率和好感度显著负相关。

27650.title: Learning from Deregulation: The Asymmetric Impact of Lockdown and Reopening on Risky Behavior During COVID-19
27650.zh_title: 从放松管制中学习：COVID-19期间封锁与重启对风险行为的不对称影响
27650.authors: Edward L. Glaeser, Ginger Zhe Jin, Benjamin T. Leyden, Michael Luca
27650.abstract: During the COVID-19 pandemic, states issued and then rescinded stay-at-home orders that restricted mobility. We develop a model of learning by deregulation, which predicts that lifting stay-at-home orders can signal that going out has become safer. Using restaurant activity data, we find that the implementation of stay-at-home orders initially had a limited impact, but that activity rose quickly after states’ reopenings. The results suggest that consumers inferred from reopening that it was safer to eat out. The rational, but mistaken inference that occurs in our model may explain why a sharp rise of COVID-19 cases followed reopening in some states.
27650.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19疫情期间，各州发布并随后撤销了限制人员流动的居家令。我们构建了一个“从放松管制中学习”的模型，该模型预测，解除居家令可能传递出外出已变得更安全的信号。利用餐厅活动数据，我们发现居家令的实施最初影响有限，但在各州重启后，活动迅速增加。结果表明，消费者从重启中推断出外出就餐更安全。我们模型中出现的这种理性但错误的推断，或许可以解释为何某些州在重启后出现了COVID-19病例的急剧增加。
27650.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D8, I18, K0

27649.title: Assessing the Quality of Illegal Copies and its Impact on Revenues and Distribution
27649.zh_title: 评估非法复制品的质量及其对收入和分销的影响
27649.abstract: Conventional wisdom holds that illegal copies cannibalize legitimate sales, even though previous research has found mixed effects, with illegal copies acting as both a substitute and a complement. The impact of the quality of illegal copies on the legal market remains unclear. Building on product uncertainty and production quality, we propose that higher quality copies benefit (hurt) sales when product uncertainty is higher (lower), during product launch (post-launch). Using motion picture and online piracy data, we estimate piracy quality by applying a latent item response theory (IRT) model based on keyword signals in the illegal copies. An interdependent system jointly estimates movie screens, revenues, downloads, and available illegal copies with piracy quality in both the launch and post-launch periods. We find that at launch, when less information is known about a movie, higher quality illegal copies demonstrate a positive sampling effect on revenues. In the post-launch period, however, higher quality illegal copies exhibit a negative substitution effect on revenues. The findings suggest producers can alleviate product uncertainty through higher quality samples at product launch while diluting piracy quality post-launch.
27649.zh_abstract: 传统观点认为非法复制品会蚕食合法销售，尽管先前研究发现其效果不一，非法复制品既可能作为替代品也可能作为互补品。非法复制品质量对合法市场的影响仍不明确。基于产品不确定性和生产质量，我们提出：当产品不确定性较高（较低）时，更高质量的复制品在发布期（发布后）会促进（损害）销售。利用电影和在线盗版数据，我们通过应用基于非法复制品中关键词信号的潜在项目反应理论模型来估计盗版质量。一个相互依赖的系统联合估计了电影上映场次、收入、下载量以及发布期和发布后期间包含盗版质量的可用非法复制品数量。我们发现，在发布期，当关于电影的信息较少时，更高质量的非法复制品对收入表现出正向的抽样效应。然而，在发布后期间，更高质量的非法复制品对收入表现出负向的替代效应。研究结果表明，生产商可以在产品发布时通过更高质量的样本来缓解产品不确定性，同时在发布后稀释盗版质量。

27648.title: How Global is Your Mutual Fund? International Diversification from Multinationals
27648.zh_title: 你的共同基金有多全球化？来自跨国公司的国际多元化
27648.authors: Irem Demirci, Miguel A. Ferreira, Pedro Matos, Clemens Sialm
27648.abstract: We show that mutual funds worldwide provide substantial international exposure through their domestic holdings of multinationals. An average domestic fund's international exposure increases by 32 percentage points when we consider international corporate diversification. We find that funds with higher indirect international exposure perform better in both the cross section and the time series. This outperformance is more pronounced among small fund families, and funds that invest in small stocks, growth stocks, and less developed capital markets. Our findings support the hypothesis that international diversification from multinationals reduces the transaction and information costs of investing abroad and captures fund manager skill.
27648.zh_abstract: 我们表明，全球共同基金通过其持有的国内跨国公司股份提供了实质性的国际敞口。当我们考虑国际公司多元化时，一只普通国内基金的国际敞口增加了32个百分点。我们发现，在横截面和时间序列中，具有更高间接国际敞口的基金表现更好。这种优异表现在小基金家族、以及投资于小盘股、成长股和欠发达资本市场的基金中更为显著。我们的发现支持了以下假设：来自跨国公司的国际多元化降低了海外投资的交易和信息成本，并捕捉了基金经理的技能。
27648.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM；JEL：F23, G11, G15, G23

27647.title: Domestic Price Dollarization in Emerging Economies
27647.zh_title: 新兴经济体的国内价格美元化
27647.abstract: This paper studies the dollarization of prices in retail markets of emerging economies. We develop a model of the firm’s optimal currency choice in retail markets in inflationary economies. We derive theoretical predictions regarding the optimality of dollar pricing, and test them using data from the largest e-trade platform in Latin America. Across countries, price dollarization is positively correlated with asset dollarization and inflation, and negatively correlated with exchange rate volatility. At the micro level, larger sellers are more likely to price in dollars, and more tradeable goods are more likely to be posted in dollars. We then show that prices are sticky, and hence the currency of prices determines the short-run reaction of both prices and quantities to a nominal exchange rate shock.
27647.zh_abstract: 本文研究了新兴经济体零售市场中价格的美元化。我们构建了一个关于企业在通胀经济体零售市场中最优货币选择的模型。我们推导出关于美元定价最优性的理论预测，并使用来自拉丁美洲最大电子交易平台的数据对其进行检验。跨国来看，价格美元化与资产美元化和通胀正相关，与汇率波动负相关。在微观层面，较大的卖家更可能以美元定价，且更可贸易的商品更可能以美元标价。然后我们表明价格是粘性的，因此定价货币决定了名义汇率冲击下价格和数量的短期反应。

27646.title: The Pass-Through of Uncertainty Shocks to Households
27646.zh_title: 不确定性冲击向家庭的传导
27646.authors: Marco Di Maggio, Amir Kermani, Rodney Ramcharan, Vincent Yao, Edison Yu
27646.abstract: Using new employer-employee matched data, this paper investigates the impact of uncertainty, as measured by idiosyncratic stock market volatility, on individual outcomes. We find that firms provide at best partial insurance to their workers. An increase in firm-level uncertainty is associated with a decline in total compensation, especially in variable pay. In turn, individuals reduce their durable goods consumption in response to these uncertainty shocks. These shocks also lead to greater financial fragility among lower-income earners. We also construct a new county-level uncertainty shock and find that local uncertainty shocks reduce county level durable consumption.
27646.zh_abstract: 利用新的雇主-雇员匹配数据，本文研究了以个股波动率衡量的不确定性对个人结果的影响。我们发现，企业最多为其员工提供部分保险。企业层面不确定性的增加与总薪酬的下降相关，尤其是可变薪酬。相应地，个人会因这些不确定性冲击而减少耐用消费品支出。这些冲击还导致低收入者面临更大的财务脆弱性。我们还构建了一个新的县级不确定性冲击，并发现当地的不确定性冲击会减少县级耐用消费。
27646.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D12, D14, E21, G5, G51

27645.title: College Majors
27645.authors: Arpita Patnaik, Matthew J. Wiswall, Basit Zafar
27645.abstract: This article reviews the recent literature on the determinants of college major choices. We first highlight long-term trends and persistent differences in college major choices by gender, race, and family background. We then review the existing research in six key areas: expected earnings and ability sorting, learning, subjective expectations, non-pecuniary considerations, peer and family effects, and supply side factors. We examine and compare the various approaches employed by previous research and highlight key areas for future research.
27645.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了近期关于大学专业选择决定因素的文献。我们首先强调了大学专业选择在性别、种族和家庭背景方面的长期趋势和持续差异。然后，我们回顾了六个关键领域的现有研究：预期收入与能力分类、学习、主观预期、非金钱因素、同伴与家庭效应以及供给侧因素。我们审视并比较了先前研究采用的各种方法，并指出了未来研究的关键领域。
27645.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：D81, D84, I21, I23, J10

27644.title: Quid Pro Quo, Knowledge Spillover, and Industrial Quality Upgrading: Evidence from the Chinese Auto Industry
27644.zh_title: 交换条件、知识溢出与产业质量升级：来自中国汽车产业的证据
27644.authors: Jie Bai, Panle Jia Barwick, Shengmao Cao, Shanjun Li
27644.abstract: This paper studies the impact of FDI via quid pro quo (technology for market access) in facilitating knowledge spillover and quality upgrades. Our context is the Chinese automobile industry, where foreign automakers are required to set up joint ventures (the quid) with domestic automakers in return for market access (the quo). Our identification strategy exploits a unique dataset of detailed vehicle quality measures and relies on within-product variation across quality dimensions. We show that affiliated domestic automakers tend to adopt the quality strengths of their joint venture partners, consistent with learning and knowledge spillover. We rule out alternative explanations, such as endogenous joint venture formation, geographic proximity, overlapping customer bases, brand image association, and patent transfers. Additional analysis shows that worker flows and supplier networks mediate knowledge spillover.
