Finally, using an equilibrium model for the auto industry, we show that knowledge spillover due to ownership affiliation, in additional to any industry-wide knowledge spillover, improved the quality of affiliated domestic models by 3.8-12.7% and raised their profits by 1.0-3.5% between 2007 and 2014.
27644.zh_abstract: 本文研究了通过交换条件（以技术换市场）的外国直接投资在促进知识溢出和质量升级方面的影响。我们的背景是中国汽车工业，其中外国汽车制造商被要求与国内汽车制造商建立合资企业（交换条件），以换取市场准入（条件）。我们的识别策略利用了一个包含详细车辆质量指标的独特数据集，并依赖于质量维度上的产品内差异。我们表明，关联的国内汽车制造商倾向于采纳其合资伙伴的质量优势，这与学习和知识溢出相一致。我们排除了其他解释，如内生合资企业形成、地理邻近性、重叠客户群、品牌形象关联和专利转让。进一步分析表明，工人流动和供应商网络中介了知识溢出。最后，利用汽车产业的均衡模型，我们表明，除了任何行业范围内的知识溢出之外，因所有权关联而产生的知识溢出，在2007年至2014年间，使关联国内车型的质量提高了3.8%-12.7%，并使其利润增加了1.0%-3.5%。
27644.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, ITI, PR；JEL：F23, O14, O25

27643.title: Frictional Sorting
27643.authors: Wenquan Liang, Ran Song, Christopher Timmins
27643.abstract: In many countries around the world, migration costs and housing supply restrictions interact with each other and combine to restrict workers’ location decisions. Using an equilibrium sorting model and rich micro data from China, we evaluate the impacts of these dual constraints on workers’ sorting behavior and quantify the resulting changes in aggregate welfare and inequality. We find strong policy interactions between the two kinds of frictions in determining welfare losses and regional inequality. Counterfactual simulations show that lowering migration costs can increase welfare and reduce regional inequality by moving workers from unproductive inland regions to productive coastal regions in China; such welfare and regional distributional impacts depend on the elasticity of housing supply in coastal regions and vice-versa. Results highlight the policy complementarities between reducing the two kinds of frictions and have general implications for countries with different levels of constraints on mobility and housing supply.
27643.zh_abstract: 在世界许多国家，迁移成本和住房供给限制相互作用，共同制约着工人的区位选择。利用均衡分类模型和来自中国的丰富微观数据，我们评估了这些双重约束对工人分类行为的影响，并量化了由此导致的总体福利和不平等的变化。我们发现，在决定福利损失和区域不平等方面，两种摩擦之间存在强烈的政策互动。反事实模拟表明，降低迁移成本可以通过将工人从中国低生产率的内陆地区转移到高生产率的沿海地区来提高福利并减少区域不平等；这种福利和区域分配效应取决于沿海地区的住房供给弹性，反之亦然。结果强调了减少两种摩擦之间的政策互补性，并对具有不同流动性和住房供给约束水平的国家具有普遍意义。

27642.title: Asset Specificity of Non-Financial Firms
27642.zh_title: 非金融企业的资产专用性
27642.abstract: The specificity of firms' assets affects a wide range of economic issues. We study asset specificity of U.S. non-financial firms using a new dataset on the liquidation recovery rates of all major asset categories across industries. First, we find that non-financial firms' assets are generally highly specific. The average recovery rate (liquidation value over cost net of depreciation) is 35% for plant, property, and equipment (PPE). Second, across industries, physical attributes such as mobility, durability, and standardization account for around 40% of variations in PPE recovery rates. Over time, macroeconomic and industry conditions have the most impact on recovery rates when PPE is not firm-specific. Third, higher asset specificity is associated with less asset sales, greater investment response to uncertainty, and more Q dispersion, consistent with theories of investment irreversibility. Finally, the data suggests that rising intangibles have had a limited impact on firms' liquidation values.
27642.zh_abstract: 企业资产的专用性影响着广泛的经济问题。我们利用一个关于各行业所有主要资产类别清算回收率的新数据集，研究了美国非金融企业的资产专用性。首先，我们发现非金融企业的资产通常具有高度专用性。厂房、财产和设备（PPE）的平均回收率（清算价值除以扣除折旧后的成本）为35%。其次，在不同行业中，流动性、耐用性和标准化等物理属性解释了PPE回收率约40%的变异。随着时间的推移，当PPE不具有企业专用性时，宏观经济和行业状况对回收率的影响最大。第三，更高的资产专用性与更少的资产出售、投资对不确定性更强的反应以及更大的托宾Q离散度相关，这与投资不可逆性的理论一致。最后，数据表明，无形资产的增加对企业清算价值的影响有限。
27642.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E22, E32, G31, G33

27641.title: Two Tales of Debt
27641.abstract: We analyze the heterogeneous nature of corporate debt contracts, some focusing on liquidation values of discrete assets whereas others on going-concern values of the business. Using hand-collected data on firm attributes, we present several findings. First, firms on average have limited liquidation values. Second, companies with lower liquidation values have more debt backed by going-concern values and more intensive monitoring of firm performance. They have higher interest rates only for debt against discrete assets. Third, secured debt is not always tied to liquidation values of discrete assets. We present a model that matches the empirical findings, which demonstrates how creditor monitoring and covenants facilitate borrowing well beyond liquidation values.
27641.zh_abstract: 我们分析了公司债务合同的异质性，其中一些侧重于离散资产的清算价值，而另一些则侧重于企业的持续经营价值。利用手工收集的企业属性数据，我们提出了几个发现。首先，企业平均而言清算价值有限。其次，清算价值较低的公司拥有更多以持续经营价值为支撑的债务，并且对企业绩效的监控更为密集。这些公司仅对以离散资产为抵押的债务支付更高的利率。第三，有担保债务并不总是与离散资产的清算价值挂钩。我们提出了一个与实证发现相匹配的模型，该模型展示了债权人监控和契约如何促进远超清算价值的借贷。

27640.title: Welfare Analysis Meets Causal Inference
27640.zh_title: 福利分析与因果推断的结合
27640.abstract: We describe a framework for empirical welfare analysis that uses the causal estimates of a policy’s impact on net government spending. This framework provides guidance for which causal effects are (and are not) needed for empirical welfare analysis of public policies.The key ingredient is the construction of each policy’s marginal value of public funds (MVPF). The MVPF is the ratio of beneficiaries’ willingness to pay for the policy to the net cost to the government. We discuss how the MVPF relates to “traditional” welfare analysis tools such as the marginal excess burden and marginal cost of public funds. We show how the MVPF can be used in practice by applying it to several canonical empirical applications from public finance, labor, development, trade, and industrial organization.
27640.zh_abstract: 我们描述了一个实证福利分析框架，该框架利用政策对政府净支出影响的因果估计。该框架为公共政策的实证福利分析需要哪些因果效应（以及不需要哪些）提供了指导。关键要素是构建每项政策的公共资金边际价值（MVPF）。MVPF是受益者对该政策的支付意愿与政府净成本之比。我们讨论了MVPF如何与“传统”福利分析工具（如边际超额负担和公共资金边际成本）相关联。我们通过将MVPF应用于来自公共财政、劳动、发展、贸易和产业组织领域的几个经典实证应用，展示了其在实际中的应用。

27639.title: Interest Rate Uncertainty and Sovereign Default Risk
27639.zh_title: 利率不确定性与主权违约风险
27639.authors: Alok Johri, Shahed Khan, César Sosa-Padilla
27639.abstract: Empirical studies suggest that fluctuations in the level and volatility of the world interest rate affect sovereign spreads in emerging economies. We incorporate an estimated time-varying process for the world interest rate (with both level and volatility shocks) into a model of sovereign default calibrated to a panel of emerging economies. Time variation in the world interest rate interacts with default incentives in the model and leads to state contingent effects similar to the empirical literature. On average, in response to a rise in the world interest rate the model delivers a 1.4 times increase in the spread. The volatility state has a major impact on this average – the increase in spreads is much larger in high volatility states. Moreover, we show that fluctuations in the world interest rate can generate considerable co-movement in sovereign yields across nations, as seen in the data.
27639.zh_abstract: 实证研究表明，世界利率水平和波动性的波动会影响新兴经济体的主权利差。我们将一个估计的世界利率时变过程（包含水平和波动性冲击）纳入一个以新兴经济体面板数据为校准的主权违约模型。模型中世界利率的时变性与违约激励相互作用，产生了与实证文献相似的、依赖于状态的效应。平均而言，面对世界利率上升，模型给出的利差增加了1.4倍。波动性状态对此平均值有重大影响——在高波动性状态下，利差的增加要大得多。此外，我们表明，正如数据所示，世界利率的波动可以在各国之间产生显著的主权利差联动。
27639.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E32, E43, F34, F41

27638.title: Molecular Genetics, Risk Aversion, Return Perceptions, and Stock Market Participation
27638.zh_title: 分子遗传学、风险厌恶、回报感知与股市参与
27638.authors: Richard Sias, Laura Starks, Harry J. Turtle
27638.abstract: We show that molecular variation in DNA related to cognition, personality, health, and body shape, predicts an individual’s equity market participation and risk aversion. Moreover, the molecular genetic endowments predict individuals’ return perceptions, most of which we find to be strikingly biased. The genetic endowments also strongly associate with many of the investor characteristics (e.g., trust, sociability, wealth) shown to explain heterogeneity in equity market participation. Our analysis helps elucidate why financial choices are heritable and how genetic endowments can help explain the links between financial choices, risk aversion, beliefs, and other variables known to explain stock market participation.
27638.zh_abstract: 我们表明，与认知、人格、健康和体型相关的DNA分子变异可以预测个人的股市参与和风险厌恶。此外，分子遗传禀赋可以预测个人的回报感知，我们发现其中大部分感知存在惊人的偏差。这些遗传禀赋还与许多已被证明能解释股市参与异质性的投资者特征（例如，信任、社交性、财富）密切相关。我们的分析有助于阐明为什么金融选择是可遗传的，以及遗传禀赋如何帮助解释金融选择、风险厌恶、信念以及其他已知能解释股市参与的变量之间的联系。

27637.title: Norwegian and US Policies Alleviate Business Vulnerability Due to the Covid-19 Shock Equally Well
27637.zh_title: 挪威和美国的政策同样有效地缓解了新冠疫情冲击带来的企业脆弱性
27637.authors: Annette Alstadsæter, Julie Brun Bjørkheim, Wojciech Kopczuk, Andreas Økland
27637.abstract: We use Norwegian administrative data and applications for emergency government support to simulate magnitude and distribution of business revenue shock due to the Covid-19 pandemic. We rely on it to analyze the impact of business support policies available in Norway and the United States by comparing simulated results from the various policies on a common data set. We find that policies supporting payroll and fixed costs that were available in both countries have a similar impact of reducing firms' economic distress, by cutting the negative effect of the crisis on profitability, liquidity, debt, and solvency by over a half.
27637.zh_abstract: 我们利用挪威的行政数据和紧急政府支持申请，模拟了新冠疫情导致的企业收入冲击的规模和分布。我们以此为基础，通过在一个共同数据集上比较各种政策的模拟结果，分析了挪威和美国可用的企业支持政策的影响。我们发现，两国都采用的、支持工资和固定成本的政策，在减少企业经济困境方面具有相似的效果，将危机对盈利能力、流动性、债务和偿付能力的负面影响削减了一半以上。

27636.title: Filling a Niche? The Maize Productivity Impacts of Adaptive Breeding by a Local Seed Company in Kenya
27636.zh_title: 填补利基？肯尼亚一家本地种子公司适应性育种对玉米生产力的影响
27636.authors: Samuel S. Bird, Michael R. Carter, Travis J. Lybbert, Mary Mathenge, Timothy Njagi, Emilia Tjernström
27636.abstract: This paper explores the idea that competitive seed systems may underserve farmers in small, agro-ecological niches, leaving those farmers less productive and poorer than they need be. We develop a theoretical model of the confluence of demand and supply factors that can result in such an equilibrium. We then empirically study the disruption of the maize seed market in Western Kenya that took place when public sector foundation breeding and social impact investment capital together allowed a local seed company to expand and target the area with adaptively-bred maize varieties. A three-year RCT reveals that these seed varieties increased farmer yields and revenues, both for better-resourced farmers (who used non-adapted hybrids and fertilizer prior to the intervention) as well less well-resourced farmers (who did not). This theoretical and empirical evidence suggests news ways for thinking about seeds systems in areas typified by high levels of agro-ecological heterogeneity.
27636.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了一个观点，即竞争性的种子系统可能无法充分服务于小型农业生态利基市场中的农民，导致这些农民的生产力低于应有水平且更加贫困。我们建立了一个理论模型，描述了可能导致这种均衡的需求和供给因素的汇合。然后，我们实证研究了肯尼亚西部玉米种子市场的变革，该变革发生在公共部门基础育种和社会影响力投资资本共同使一家本地种子公司得以扩张，并以适应性培育的玉米品种为目标服务该地区时。一项为期三年的随机对照试验表明，这些种子品种提高了农民的产量和收入，无论是对于资源较充足的农民（他们在干预前使用非适应性杂交种和化肥）还是资源较少的农民（他们未使用这些投入）。这一理论和实证证据为思考农业生态异质性较高地区的种子系统提供了新思路。

27635.title: Behavioral Corporate Finance: The Life Cycle of a CEO Career
27635.zh_title: 行为公司金融：CEO职业生涯的生命周期
27635.abstract: One of the fastest-growing areas of finance research is the study of managerial biases and their implications for firm outcomes. Since the mid-2000s, this strand of behavioral corporate finance has provided theoretical and empirical evidence on the influence of biases in the corporate realm, such as overconfidence, experience effects, and the sunk-cost fallacy. The field has been a leading force in dismantling the argument that traditional economic mechanisms— selection, learning, and market discipline—would suffice to uphold the rational-manager paradigm. Instead, the evidence reveals that behavioral forces exert a significant influence at every stage of a chief executive officer’s (CEO’s) career. First, at the appointment stage, selection does not impede the promotion of behavioral managers. Instead, competitive environments oftentimes promote their advancement, even under value-maximizing selection mechanisms. Second, while at the helm of the company, learning opportunities are limited, since many managerial decisions occur at low frequency, and their causal effects are clouded by self-attribution bias and difficult to disentangle from those of concurrent events. Third, at the dismissal stage, market discipline does not ensure the firing of biased decision-makers as board members themselves are subject to biases in their evaluation of CEOs. \nBy documenting how biases affect even the most educated and influential decision-makers, such as CEOs, the field has generated important insights into the hard-wiring of biases. Biases do not simply stem from a lack of education, nor are they restricted to low-ability agents. Instead, biases are significant elements of human decision-making at the highest levels of organizations. \nAn important question for future research is how to limit, in each CEO career phase, the adverse effects of managerial biases. Potential approaches include refining selection mechanisms, designing and implementing corporate repairs, and reshaping corporate governance to account not only for incentive misalignments but also for biased decision-making.
27635.zh_abstract: 金融研究中增长最快的领域之一是对管理者偏见及其对公司结果影响的研究。自2000年代中期以来，这一行为公司金融分支提供了关于偏见在公司领域影响的理论和实证证据，例如过度自信、经验效应和沉没成本谬误。该领域一直是瓦解传统经济机制——选择、学习和市场纪律——足以维持理性管理者范式这一论点的主导力量。相反，证据表明，行为力量在首席执行官（CEO）职业生涯的每个阶段都发挥着显著影响。首先，在任命阶段，选择并不会阻碍有行为偏见的经理人的晋升。相反，竞争环境常常促进他们的晋升，即使在价值最大化的选择机制下也是如此。其次，在执掌公司期间，学习机会有限，因为许多管理决策发生频率低，其因果效应被自我归因偏差所模糊，并且难以与同时发生的事件的影响区分开来。第三，在解雇阶段，市场纪律并不能确保有偏见的决策者被解雇，因为董事会成员自身在评估CEO时也会受到偏见的影响。

27634.title: Design Choices for Central Bank Digital Currency: Policy and Technical Considerations
27634.zh_title: 央行数字货币的设计选择：政策与技术考量
27634.authors: Sarah Allen, Srđjan Čapkun, Ittay Eyal, Giulia Fanti, Bryan A. Ford, James Grimmelmann, Ari Juels, Kari Kostiainen, Sarah Meiklejohn, Andrew Miller, Eswar Prasad, Karl Wüst, Fan Zhang
27634.abstract: Central banks around the world are exploring and in some cases even piloting Central Bank Digital Currencies (CBDCs). CBDCs promise to realize a broad range of new capabilities, including direct government disbursements to citizens, frictionless consumer payment and money-transfer systems, and a range of new financial instruments and monetary policy levers.
27634.zh_abstract: 全球各国央行正在探索，甚至在某些情况下试点央行数字货币（CBDCs）。CBDCs有望实现一系列广泛的新能力，包括直接向公民发放政府款项、无摩擦的消费者支付和汇款系统，以及一系列新型金融工具和货币政策杠杆。

27699.title: Understanding Tax Policy: How Do People Reason?
27699.zh_title: 理解税收政策：人们如何推理？
27699.abstract: I study how people understand, reason, and learn about two major tax policies: income taxation and estate taxation. Using large-scale Social Economics surveys issued to representative U.S. samples and associated experiments, I seek to elicit respondents' factual knowledge about tax policy and the income or wealth distributions. Most importantly, I study their understanding of the mechanisms of tax policy and the reasoning that underlies their policy views. In decomposing policy views, I find that support for income and estate taxes is most strongly correlated with social preferences, i.e., the perceived benefits of redistribution and concerns around the fairness of inequality and taxation, as well as with broader views of the government. Efficiency concerns play a more minor role. These correlational patterns are confirmed by the experimental approach, which shows people instructional videos that explain the workings and consequences of one of the aspects of tax policy (the "Redistribution'' and the "Efficiency'' treatments) or that bring the two together and focus on the trade-off (the "Economist'' treatment). The Redistribution and Economist treatments significantly increase support for more progressive income or estate taxes, while the Efficiency treatment has no effect. There are large partisan gaps in both the final policy views, and at every step of the reasoning about the underlying mechanisms of taxes. Democrats' and Republicans' divergences in tax policy views can ultimately be traced back to different normative criteria (social preferences) and views of the government, rather than to different perceptions of the efficiency implications of taxation.
27699.zh_abstract: 我研究人们如何理解、推理和学习两项主要税收政策：所得税和遗产税。通过对具有代表性的美国样本进行大规模社会经济学调查及相关实验，我试图引出受访者关于税收政策以及收入或财富分配的事实知识。最重要的是，我研究他们对税收政策机制的理解以及支撑其政策观点的推理过程。在分解政策观点时，我发现对所得税和遗产税的支持与社会偏好（即对再分配感知到的益处以及对不平等和税收公平性的关注）以及更广泛的政府观点相关性最强。效率关切的作用较小。这些相关模式通过实验方法得到证实，实验方法向人们展示解释税收政策某一方面（“再分配”和“效率”处理）运作和后果的教学视频，或者将两者结合并聚焦于权衡（“经济学家”处理）。“再分配”和“经济学家”处理显著增加了对更累进所得税或遗产税的支持，而“效率”处理没有效果。在最终政策观点以及关于税收潜在机制推理的每一步，都存在巨大的党派分歧。民主党人和共和党人在税收政策观点上的分歧最终可以追溯到不同的规范性标准（社会偏好）和政府观点，而不是对税收效率影响的不同看法。
27699.meta: Programs：PE, POL；JEL：D72, D9, H20, H24, H3

27698.title: The International Aspects of Macroprudential Policy
27698.zh_title: 宏观审慎政策的国际层面
27698.abstract: Countries are using macroprudential tools more actively with the goal of improving the resilience of their broader financial systems. A growing body of evidence suggests that these tools can accomplish specific domestic goals and should reduce country vulnerability to many domestic and international shocks. The evidence also suggests, however, that these policies are not an elixir. They will not insulate economies from volatility and they generate leakages to the non-bank financial system and spillovers through international borrowing, lending and other cross-border exposures. Some of these unintended consequences can mitigate the effectiveness of macroprudential policies and generate new vulnerabilities and risks. The “Corona Crisis” provides a lens to evaluate the effectiveness of current macroprudential regulations during a period of extreme market volatility and economic stress. Experience to date suggests that macroprudential tools provide some benefits and can help achieve certain macroeconomic goals, but they have limitations and expectations of what they can accomplish must be realistic.
27698.zh_abstract: 各国正更积极地运用宏观审慎工具，旨在增强其整体金融体系的韧性。越来越多的证据表明，这些工具能够实现特定的国内目标，并应能降低国家面对众多国内和国际冲击的脆弱性。然而，证据也表明，这些政策并非万能药。它们无法使经济体免受波动影响，并且会产生向非银行金融体系的泄漏，以及通过国际借贷和其他跨境敞口产生溢出效应。其中一些意外后果可能会削弱宏观审慎政策的有效性，并产生新的脆弱性和风险。“新冠危机”提供了一个视角，用以评估当前宏观审慎监管在市场极端波动和经济压力时期的有效性。迄今为止的经验表明，宏观审慎工具能带来一些益处，并有助于实现某些宏观经济目标，但它们存在局限性，对其所能达成目标的期望必须切合实际。
27698.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, E5, F33, F36, F38, G21, G23, G28

27697.title: Peak China Housing
27697.abstract: China’s real estate has been a key engine of its sustained economic expansion. This paper argues, however, that even before the Covid-19 shock, a decades-long housing boom had given rise to severe price misalignments and regional supply-demand mismatches, making an adjustment both necessary and inevitable. We make use of newly available and updated data sources to analyze supply-demand conditions in the fast-moving Chinese economy. The imbalances are then compared to benchmarks from other economies. We conclude that the sector is quite vulnerable to a sustained aggregate growth shock, such as Covid-19 might pose. In our baseline calibration, using input-output tables and taking account of the very large footprint of housing construction and real-estate related sectors, the adjustment to a decline in housing activity can easily trim a cumulative 5-10 percent from the level of output (over a period of years).
27697.zh_abstract: 中国的房地产一直是其持续经济增长的关键引擎。然而，本文认为，即使在新冠疫情冲击之前，持续数十年的住房繁荣已导致严重的价格失衡和区域供需错配，使得调整既必要又不可避免。我们利用新近可得和更新的数据源，分析快速发展的中国经济中的供需状况。然后将这些失衡与其他经济体的基准进行比较。我们得出结论，该行业相当容易受到持续的总体增长冲击（例如新冠疫情可能带来的冲击）的影响。在我们的基准校准中，使用投入产出表并考虑到住房建设和房地产相关行业的巨大体量，对住房活动下降的调整很容易在数年内使产出水平累计减少5%至10%。

27696.title: Decoding India's Low Covid-19 Case Fatality rate
27696.zh_title: 解读印度较低的新冠肺炎病死率
27696.authors: Minu Philip, Debraj Ray, S. Subramanian
27696.abstract: India’s case fatality rate (CFR) under covid-19 is strikingly low, trending from 3% or more, to a current level of around 2.2%. The world average rate is far higher, at around 4%. Several observers have noted that this difference is at least partly due to India’s younger age distribution. In this paper, we use age-specific fatality rates from 14 comparison countries, coupled with India’s distribution of covid-19 cases to “predict" what India’s CFR would be with those age-specific rates. In most cases, those predictions are lower than India’s actual performance, suggesting that India’s CFR is, if anything, too high rather than too low. We supplement the prediction exercises with the application of a decomposition technique, and we additionally account for time lags between case incidence and death, for a more relevant cross-country perspective in the growth phase of the pandemic.
27696.zh_abstract: 印度在新冠疫情下的病死率（CFR）低得惊人，从3%或更高趋势降至目前约2.2%的水平。世界平均病死率则高得多，约为4%。几位观察者指出，这种差异至少部分归因于印度较年轻的年龄分布。在本文中，我们利用14个比较国家的年龄别病死率，结合印度新冠病例的年龄分布，来“预测”如果采用这些年龄别病死率，印度的病死率会是多少。在大多数情况下，这些预测值低于印度的实际表现，这表明印度的病死率非但不低，反而偏高。我们通过应用分解技术来补充预测练习，并且额外考虑了病例发生与死亡之间的时间滞后，以便在大流行的增长阶段获得更具相关性的跨国视角。

27695.title: Public and Private Provision of Information in Market-Based Public Programs: Evidence from Advertising in Health Insurance Marketplaces
27695.zh_title: 基于市场的公共项目中信息的公共与私人提供：来自健康保险市场广告的证据
27695.abstract: This paper studies the effect of provision of information by the government and private firms through marketing activities in the Affordable Care Act health insurance marketplace. Using detailed TV advertising data, we present evidence that government advertising and private advertising target different geographical areas and provide different messaging content. We estimate the impacts of both types of advertising on consumer demand. We find that government advertising increases overall enrollment and enhances welfare; however, it does not induce consumers to select a particular insurer. Private advertising, in contrast, increases demand for specific insurers, and insurers spending more on advertising tend to offer plans associated with higher consumer utility. However, private advertising alone does not induce consumers to select insurers with better plans very efficiently because it tends to be excessive due to rent-seeking competition.
27695.zh_abstract: 本文研究了政府和私营企业通过《平价医疗法案》健康保险市场中的营销活动提供信息的效果。利用详细的电视广告数据，我们提供的证据表明，政府广告和私人广告针对不同的地理区域，并提供不同的信息内容。我们估计了两种类型广告对消费者需求的影响。我们发现，政府广告增加了总体参保率并提升了福利；然而，它并未诱导消费者选择特定的保险公司。相比之下，私人广告增加了对特定保险公司的需求，并且广告支出较多的保险公司倾向于提供与更高消费者效用相关的计划。然而，仅靠私人广告并不能非常有效地诱导消费者选择计划更优的保险公司，因为寻租竞争往往导致广告过度。
27695.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：G2, I1, I3, L1, M3

27694.title: The Effect of Job Displacement on College Enrollment: Evidence from Ohio
27694.zh_title: 工作流失对大学入学的影响：来自俄亥俄州的证据
27694.authors: Veronica Minaya, Brendan Moore, Judith Scott-Clayton
27694.abstract: Displaced workers suﬀer large and persistent earnings losses. These losses can be mitigated by returning to school, yet the extent to which such workers enroll in post-secondary education in response to displacement is poorly understood. Using employer-employee-student matched administrative data from Ohio, we provide the ﬁrst direct evidence of workers’ enrollment responses following mass layoﬀs in the United States. Close to 10% of these displaced workers enroll in public two- or four-year colleges after displacement, with the typical enrollment persisting for ﬁve semesters and 29% completing a degree. However, much of this enrollment may have occurred regardless of the displacement. To estimate a causal eﬀect, we compare displaced workers over time to similar non-displaced workers. We estimate that for every 100 displaced workers, only about 1 is ever induced to enroll in a public college as a result. This eﬀect is concentrated almost entirely among displaced manufacturing workers, who enroll at a rate of 2.5 per every 100. Such workers with lower within-ﬁrm earnings and from local labor markets with limited for-proﬁt college options are the most likely to enroll in public institutions.
27694.zh_abstract: 被解雇的工人会遭受巨大且持久的收入损失。这些损失可以通过重返学校来缓解，然而，这些工人因失业而进入高等教育机构学习的程度尚不明确。利用俄亥俄州雇主-雇员-学生匹配的行政数据，我们首次提供了美国大规模裁员后工人入学反应的直接证据。近10%的被解雇工人在失业后进入公立两年制或四年制大学，典型的入学持续五个学期，其中29%完成了学位。然而，这些入学行为中有很大一部分可能无论是否失业都会发生。为了估计因果效应，我们将被解雇工人与相似的非被解雇工人进行跨时间比较。我们估计，每100名被解雇工人中，只有大约1人因此被诱导进入公立大学。这种效应几乎完全集中在被解雇的制造业工人中，他们的入学率为每100人中有2.5人。那些在工厂内收入较低且来自营利性大学选择有限的当地劳动力市场的工人，最有可能进入公立院校。

27693.title: How Did U.S. Consumers Use Their Stimulus Payments?
27693.zh_title: 美国消费者如何使用他们的刺激支票？
27693.authors: Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
27693.abstract: Using a large-scale survey of U.S. consumers, we study how the large one-time transfers to individuals from the CARES Act affected their consumption, saving and labor-supply decisions. Most respondents report that they primarily saved or paid down debts with their transfers, with only about 15 percent reporting that they mostly spent it. When providing a detailed breakdown of how they used their checks, individuals report having spent or planning to spend only around 40 percent of the total transfer on average. This relatively low rate of spending out of a one-time transfer is higher for those facing liquidity constraints, who are out of the labor force, who live in larger households, who are less educated and those who received smaller amounts. We find no meaningful effect on labor-supply decisions from these transfer payments, except for twenty percent of the unemployed who report that the stimulus payment made them search harder for a job.
27693.zh_abstract: 利用对美国消费者的大规模调查，我们研究了《关怀法案》中一次性大额转移支付如何影响他们的消费、储蓄和劳动供给决策。大多数受访者报告说，他们主要将转移支付用于储蓄或偿还债务，只有约15%的人报告说他们主要花掉了。当提供如何使用支票的详细分类时，个人报告平均只花费或计划花费总转移支付的大约40%。这种一次性转移支付相对较低的支出率，在面临流动性约束、不在劳动力队伍中、生活在较大家庭、受教育程度较低以及收到金额较少的人群中更高。我们发现这些转移支付对劳动供给决策没有显著影响，除了20%的失业者报告说刺激支付使他们更努力地寻找工作。

27692.title: Union Membership Peaks in Midlife
27692.zh_title: 工会会员资格在中年达到顶峰
27692.abstract: Using data from 68 countries on over 8 million respondents over forty years we show union membership peaks in midlife – usually around workers’ late 40s or early 50s. In doing so we extend Blanchflower’s (2007) earlier study, incorporating a further 39 countries and another decade or so of data. We also found it in every US state and the District of Columbia as well as across industries. The fact that this relationship exists in virtually every country across the world challenges a key precept in industrial relations, namely that institutions matter: they appear to matter little, at least in the case of the hump-shaped relationship between unionization and age. The union membership rates at the age peak in the United States and the United Kingdom have lowered over time, while the age at which the peak has occurred has increased in both countries. In part this is due to increasing union membership rates among those over the age of sixty-five. Declines in membership by birth cohort have lowered union density rates as the older cohorts with historically higher membership rates leave labor markets.
27692.zh_abstract: 利用来自68个国家、超过800万受访者、跨越四十年的数据，我们显示工会会员资格在中年达到顶峰——通常在工人接近50岁或50岁出头时。在此过程中，我们扩展了Blanchflower（2007）的早期研究，纳入了另外39个国家和大约十年的数据。我们还在美国的每个州、哥伦比亚特区以及各个行业中都发现了这一现象。这一关系在世界上几乎每个国家都存在的事实，挑战了劳资关系中的一个关键信条，即制度很重要：它们似乎并不重要，至少在工会化与年龄之间的驼峰形关系方面是如此。美国和英国的工会会员率在年龄峰值处随时间推移而下降，而两国达到峰值的年龄则有所增加。这部分是由于65岁以上人群的工会会员率上升。出生队列的会员人数下降降低了工会密度率，因为历史上会员率较高的年长队列正在离开劳动力市场。

27691.title: Low Interest Rates, Policy, and the Predictive Content of the Yield Curve
27691.zh_title: 低利率、政策与收益率曲线的预测内容
27691.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Joseph G. Haubrich
27691.abstract: Does the yield curve's ability to predict future output and recessions differ when interest rates are low, as in the current global environment? In this paper we build on recent econometric work by Shi, Phillips and Hurn that detects changes in the causal impact of the yield curve and relate that to the level of interest rates. We explore the issue using historical data going back to the 19th century for the US and more recent data for the UK, Germany, and Japan. This paper is similar in spirit to Ramey and Zubairy (2018) who look at the government spending multiplier in times of low interest rates.
27691.zh_abstract: 当利率处于当前全球环境中的低位时，收益率曲线预测未来产出和衰退的能力是否有所不同？在本文中，我们基于Shi、Phillips和Hurn最近的计量经济学工作，该工作检测了收益率曲线因果影响的变化，并将其与利率水平联系起来。我们利用美国可追溯到19世纪的历史数据以及英国、德国和日本更近期的数据来探讨这个问题。本文在精神上与Ramey和Zubairy（2018）相似，他们研究了低利率时期的政府支出乘数。

27690.title: Return to Venture Capital in the Aggregate
27690.authors: Shumiao Ouyang, Jiaheng Yu, Ravi Jagannathan
27690.abstract: We examine the performance of the Aggregate Portfolio of All Equity Investments (APAEI) in 17,242 ventures with first funding round between 1980 and 2006 by following them till 2018, or their exits if earlier. The Gornall and Strebulaev (2020) upward bias in later-stage pre-money-valuations, while affecting all funding-round-to-exit returns, does not affect APAEI’s performance. APAEI had an internal rate of return of 22%, and a superior Generalized Public Market Equivalent of 1.44. When the best 5% of the ventures are dropped from the APAEI portfolio, the risk adjusted return becomes negative. The APAEI portfolio return declines after 1999.
27690.zh_abstract: 我们考察了1980年至2006年间首次融资的17,242家风险企业的全部股权投资组合（APAEI）的表现，追踪这些企业直至2018年，或更早的退出时点。Gornall和Strebulaev（2020）指出的后期融资前估值向上偏差，虽然影响所有从融资轮到退出的回报率，但并不影响APAEI的表现。APAEI的内部收益率为22%，广义公开市场等价倍数为1.44，表现优异。当从APAEI组合中剔除表现最好的5%的风险企业后，风险调整后的回报变为负值。APAEI组合的回报率在1999年之后出现下降。
27690.meta: Programs：AP, PR；JEL：G0, G00, G1, G10, G12, G19

27689.title: Discrimination and Racial Disparities in Labor Market Outcomes: Evidence from WWII
27689.zh_title: 劳动力市场结果中的歧视与种族差异：来自二战的证据
27689.authors: Anna Aizer, Ryan Boone, Adriana Lleras-Muney, Jonathan Vogel
27689.abstract: The 1940s witnessed substantial reductions in the Black-white earnings gap. We study the role that domestic WWII defense production played in reducing this gap. Exploiting variation across labor markets in the allocation of war contracts to private firms, we find that war production contracts resulted in significant increases in the earnings of Black workers and declines in the racial wage gap, with no effect on white workers. This was achieved via occupational upgrading among Black men to skilled occupations. The gains largely persisted through at least 1970. Using a structural model, we show that declines in discrimination (and not migration or changes in productivity) account for all of the occupational upgrading and half of the estimated wage gains associated with the war production effort. Additionally, the war production effort explains one quarter (one seventh) of the overall improvements in racial gaps in occupation allocations (wages) witnessed over this decade. Finally, war spending led to an increase in the high school graduation rate of Black children, suggesting important intergenerational spillovers associated with declines in labor market discrimination.
27689.zh_abstract: 20世纪40年代见证了黑人与白人之间收入差距的大幅缩小。我们研究了国内二战军工生产在缩小这一差距中所起的作用。利用不同劳动力市场之间军工合同分配给私营企业的差异，我们发现军工生产合同显著提高了黑人劳动者的收入，并缩小了种族工资差距，但对白人劳动者没有影响。这是通过黑人男性向技能型职业的职业升级实现的。这些收益在很大程度上至少持续到了1970年。通过一个结构模型，我们表明歧视的减少（而非迁移或生产率变化）解释了与军工生产努力相关的全部职业升级和一半的估计工资收益。此外，军工生产努力解释了这十年间观察到的种族职业分配差距（工资差距）总体改善的四分之一（七分之一）。最后，军费支出还导致黑人儿童的高中毕业率上升，这表明与劳动力市场歧视减少相关的重要代际溢出效应。
27689.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：J24, J3, J7, N12, N4

27688.title: What Determines School Segregation? The Crucial Role of Neighborhood Factors
27688.zh_title: 什么决定了学校隔离？邻里因素的关键作用
27688.abstract: We develop a novel strategy to identify the relative importance of school and neighborhood factors in determining school segregation. Using detailed student enrollment and residential location data, our research design compares differences in student composition between adjacent Census blocks served by different schools to analogous differences between those schools. Our findings indicate that neighborhood factors explain around 62% of racial segregation and 44% of economic segregation across all schools, playing an even more pronounced role in urban areas, where school segregation has been especially acute. These findings suggest that the involvement of urban planners is essential when attempting to confront inequality of opportunity through education.
27688.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种新颖的策略来识别学校和邻里因素在决定学校隔离中的相对重要性。利用详细的学生入学和居住地点数据，我们的研究设计比较了由不同学校服务的相邻人口普查区块之间的学生构成差异，与这些学校之间的类似差异。我们的研究结果表明，邻里因素解释了所有学校中约62%的种族隔离和44%的经济隔离，在城市地区，这种作用更为显著，而城市地区的学校隔离尤为严重。这些发现表明，在试图通过教育应对机会不平等问题时，城市规划者的参与至关重要。

27687.title: The Macroeconomic Effects of Macroprudential Policy: Evidence from a Narrative Approach
27687.zh_title: 宏观审慎政策的宏观经济效应：来自叙事方法的证据
27687.authors: Diego Rojas, Carlos A. Vegh, Guillermo Vuletin
27687.abstract: We analyze the macroeconomic effects of macroprudential policy – in the form of legal reserve requirements – in three Latin American countries (Argentina, Brazil, and Uruguay). To correctly identify innovations in changes in legal reserve requirements, we develop a narrative approach – based on contemporaneous reports from the IMF and Central Banks in the spirit of Romer and Romer (2010) – that classifies each change into endogenous or exogenous to the business cycle. We show that this distinction is critical in understanding the macroeconomic effects of reserve requirements. In particular, we show that output falls in response to exogenous increases in legal reserve requirements but would seem not to be affected (or could even increase!) when using all changes and relying on traditional time-identifying strategies. This bias reflects the practical relevance of the misidentification of endogenous countercyclical changes in reserve requirements. We also push the empirical frontier along two important dimensions. First, in measuring legal reserve requirements, we take into account both the different types of legal reserve requirements in terms of maturity and currency of denomination as well as the structure of deposits. Second, since in practice reserve requirement policy is tightly linked to monetary policy, we also jointly analyze the macroeconomic effects of changes in central bank interest rates. To properly identify exogenous central bank interest rate shocks, we follow Romer and Romer (2004).
27687.zh_abstract: 我们分析了三个拉丁美洲国家（阿根廷、巴西和乌拉圭）以法定准备金率形式实施的宏观审慎政策的宏观经济效应。为了正确识别法定准备金率变动的冲击，我们开发了一种叙事方法——基于国际货币基金组织和中央银行的同时期报告，遵循Romer和Romer（2010）的思路——将每次变动分类为对商业周期的内生或外生变动。我们表明，这种区分对于理解准备金要求的宏观经济效应至关重要。特别是，我们发现，当使用所有变动并依赖传统的时间识别策略时，产出似乎不受影响（甚至可能增加！），但对外生性法定准备金率提高的反应是下降的。这种偏差反映了对准备金要求内生性逆周期变动的错误识别的实际相关性。我们还沿着两个重要维度推进了实证前沿。首先，在衡量法定准备金率时，我们既考虑了不同期限和计价货币的法定准备金类型，也考虑了存款结构。其次，由于在实践中准备金要求政策与货币政策紧密相连，我们还联合分析了中央银行利率变动的宏观经济效应。为了正确识别外生性的中央银行利率冲击，我们遵循了Romer和Romer（2004）的方法。

27686.title: Patenting Inventions or Inventing Patents? Continuation Practice at the USPTO
27686.zh_title: 为发明申请专利还是为专利发明？美国专利商标局的延续申请实践
27686.abstract: Continuations allow inventors to add new claims to old patents, leading to concerns about inadvertent infringement and holdup. We study the use of continuations to obtain standard essential patents (SEPs), a setting where patents are easily linked to possibly infringing technology. Continuation filings increase after standard publication. This effect is larger when patent examiners are more lenient, and for applicants with licensing-based business models. Claims of SEPs also become more similar after standard publication, and late claiming is positively correlated with litigation. Our findings suggest widespread use of continuations to “invent patents” that are infringed by already-published standards.
27686.zh_abstract: 延续申请允许发明人为旧专利添加新权利要求，引发了对无意侵权和专利劫持的担忧。我们研究了利用延续申请获取标准必要专利（SEP）的情况，在这种情境下，专利很容易与可能侵权的技术联系起来。标准发布后，延续申请提交量增加。当专利审查员更为宽松时，以及对于以许可为基础的商业模式的申请人，这种效应更大。标准必要专利的权利要求在标准发布后也变得更加相似，并且后期权利要求与诉讼呈正相关。我们的发现表明，广泛使用延续申请来“发明专利”，这些专利被已发布的标准所侵权。

27685.title: Behavioral Welfare Economics and Risk Preferences: A Bayesian Approach
27685.zh_title: 行为福利经济学与风险偏好：一种贝叶斯方法
27685.authors: Xiaoxue Sherry Gao, Glenn W. Harrison, Rusty Tchernis
27685.abstract: We propose the use of Bayesian estimation of risk preferences of individuals for applications of behavioral welfare economics to evaluate observed choices that involve risk. Bayesian estimation provides more systematic control of the use of informative priors over inferences about risk preferences for each individual in a sample. We demonstrate that these methods make a difference to the rigorous normative evaluation of decisions in a case study of insurance purchases. We also show that hierarchical Bayesian methods can be used to infer welfare reliably and efficiently even with significantly reduced demands on the number of choices that each subject has to make. Finally, we illustrate the natural use of Bayesian methods in the adaptive evaluation of welfare.
27685.zh_abstract: 我们建议使用贝叶斯估计个体风险偏好的方法，用于行为福利经济学的应用，以评估涉及风险的观察选择。贝叶斯估计提供了对样本中每个个体风险偏好推断中使用信息性先验的更系统控制。我们通过一个保险购买案例研究证明，这些方法对决策的严格规范评估产生了影响。我们还表明，即使显著减少每个受试者必须做出的选择数量，分层贝叶斯方法也能可靠且高效地推断福利。最后，我们说明了贝叶斯方法在福利适应性评估中的自然应用。
27685.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：C11, D6, D81, G40

27684.title: Generalizable and Robust TV Advertising Effects
27684.zh_title: 可推广且稳健的电视广告效果
27684.authors: Bradley Shapiro, Günter J. Hitsch, Anna Tuchman
27684.abstract: We provide generalizable and robust results on the causal sales effect of TV advertising for a large number of products in many categories. Such generalizable results provide a prior distribution that can improve the advertising decisions made by firms and the analysis and recommendations of policy makers. To provide generalizable results, we base our analysis on a large number of products and clearly lay out the research protocol used to select the products. We characterize the distribution of all estimates, irrespective of sign, size, or statistical significance. To ensure generalizability, we document the robustness of the estimates. First, we examine the sensitivity of the results to the assumptions made when constructing the data used in estimation. Second, we document whether the estimated effects are sensitive to the identification strategies that we use to claim causality based on observational data. Our results reveal substantially smaller advertising elasticities compared to the results documented in the extant literature, as well as a sizable percentage of statistically insignificant or negative estimates. Finally, we conduct an analysis of return on investment (ROI). While our results show that many brands perform better with their observed advertising than they would without advertising, we document considerable over-investment in advertising at the margin.
27684.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于电视广告对众多类别中大量产品的因果销售效应的可推广且稳健的结果。这些可推广的结果提供了一个先验分布，可以改善企业的广告决策以及政策制定者的分析和建议。为了提供可推广的结果，我们的分析基于大量产品，并清晰阐述了用于选择产品的研究方案。我们描述了所有估计值的分布，无论其符号、大小或统计显著性如何。为确保可推广性，我们记录了估计值的稳健性。首先，我们检验了结果对构建估计所用数据时所作假设的敏感性。其次，我们记录了估计效果是否对我们基于观测数据声称因果关系的识别策略敏感。我们的结果显示，与现有文献中记录的结果相比，广告弹性显著更小，并且有相当大比例的估计值在统计上不显著或为负。最后，我们进行了投资回报率（ROI）分析。虽然我们的结果表明，许多品牌在有广告的情况下比没有广告时表现更好，但我们记录了在边际上存在显著的广告过度投资。
27684.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：B41, C18, C52, C55, C81, L00, L15, L81, M31, M37

27683.title: A History of Pricing Pollution (Or, Why Pigouvian Taxes are not Necessarily Pigouvian)
27683.zh_title: 污染定价的历史（或，为什么庇古税不一定是庇古式的）
27683.abstract: The standard history of modern environmental economics often views it as an application of A.C. Pigou's theory of externalities, refined over the decades and applied to environmental problems in the 1960s, when the first detailed pro-posals for pricing pollution were outlined by Allen Kneese, Thomas Crocker, John Dales, and others. However, the historical literature has noted problems with this narrative, including a 30-year gap in discussions of such applications and few actual citations to Pigou. This paper offers a simple explanation for this puzzle: Namely, pollution pricing is not (necessarily) Pigouvian. It argues that the early applied literature on the topic was rooted more in questions about common property resources and increasing returns from developing natural re-sources. Both topics were treated by broad literatures by the 1960s, including distinctly American traditions not particularly associated with Pigou.
27683.zh_abstract: 现代环境经济学的标准历史通常将其视为A.C.庇古外部性理论的应用，经过几十年的完善，并在20世纪60年代应用于环境问题，当时艾伦·尼斯、托马斯·克罗克、约翰·戴尔斯等人提出了首批详细的污染定价方案。然而，历史文献指出了这一叙述存在的问题，包括此类应用讨论中存在30年的空白，以及实际引用庇古的情况很少。本文为这一谜题提供了一个简单的解释：即污染定价（不一定）是庇古式的。它认为，关于该主题的早期应用文献更多地植根于关于公共财产资源和开发自然资源带来的递增回报的问题。到20世纪60年代，这两个主题都已被广泛的文献所探讨，包括与庇古没有特别关联的独特的美国传统。

27682.title: Dollar Safety and the Global Financial Cycle
27682.zh_title: 美元安全性与全球金融周期
27682.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Arvind Krishnamurthy, Hanno Lustig
27682.abstract: We develop a model of the global financial cycle with one key ingredient: the international demand for safe dollar assets. The model matches patterns of dollar borrowing and currency mismatch, the U.S. external balance sheet, exorbitant privilege, spillovers of the U.S. monetary policy to the rest of the world, and the dollar as a global risk factor. In doing so, we lay out a novel transmission mechanism through which the U.S. monetary policy affects the currency market and the global economy. The global financial cycle is a dollar cycle.
27682.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个全球金融周期模型，其关键要素是国际对安全美元资产的需求。该模型匹配了美元借贷与货币错配的模式、美国外部资产负债表、过高特权、美国货币政策对世界其他地区的溢出效应，以及美元作为全球风险因素的特征。在此过程中，我们阐述了一种新的传导机制，美国货币政策通过该机制影响外汇市场和全球经济。全球金融周期即美元周期。
27682.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E4, F3, G15

27681.title: Autonomy and Technology Adoption
27681.authors: Benjamin Bushong, Carolina Corral, Xavier Giné, Aprajit Mahajan, Enrique Seira
27681.abstract: We examine whether autonomy increases adherence to expert recommendations in technology adoption. In a context where farmers overuse fertilizer, we ran a field experiment that combined recommendations with either a restrictive subsidy tied to expert-recommended inputs or a flexible subsidy preserving farmer autonomy over input choice. In the short run, farmers adopted expert recommendations at similar rates regardless of subsidy autonomy and reduced fertilizer over-use by two-thirds. In the longer run, after the intervention ended, farmers with autonomy were significantly more likely to persist with the expert recommendations. We replicate these findings in a complementary laboratory experiment and find suggestive evidence that autonomy increases persistence by improving recommendation recall. Our results suggest that preserving choice can enhance the long-term effectiveness of expert advice and targeted subsidies.
27681.zh_abstract: 我们考察了在技术采纳中，自主性是否提高了对专家建议的遵循程度。在农民过度使用化肥的背景下，我们进行了一项实地实验，将建议与两种补贴相结合：一种是限制性补贴，与专家推荐的投入品挂钩；另一种是灵活补贴，保留农民对投入品选择的自主性。短期内，无论补贴自主性如何，农民以相似的比例采纳专家建议，并将化肥过度使用减少了三分之二。在干预结束后的较长期内，拥有自主性的农民显著更有可能坚持专家建议。我们在互补的实验室实验中复制了这些发现，并发现提示性证据表明，自主性通过改善建议回忆来提高坚持率。我们的结果表明，保留选择权可以增强专家建议和定向补贴的长期有效性。

27680.title: Improving Management through Worker Evaluations: Evidence from Auto Manufacturing
27680.zh_title: 通过员工评价改善管理：来自汽车制造业的证据
27680.abstract: Using a randomized experiment with an automobile manufacturing firm in China, we measure the effects of letting workers evaluate their managers on worker and firm outcomes. In the treatment teams, workers evaluate their supervisors monthly. We find that providing feedback leads to significant reductions in worker turnover and increases in team-level productivity. In addition, workers report higher levels of happiness and positive mood. The evidence suggests that these results are driven by changes in the behavior of managers and an overall better relationship between managers and workers.
27680.zh_abstract: 我们利用与中国一家汽车制造企业的随机实验，衡量了让员工评价其管理者对员工和企业结果的影响。在实验组团队中，员工每月评价其主管。我们发现，提供反馈导致员工离职率显著降低，团队层面生产率提高。此外，员工报告了更高的幸福感和积极情绪。证据表明，这些结果是由管理者行为的变化以及管理者与员工之间整体关系的改善所驱动的。

27679.title: Social Learning along International Migrant Networks
27679.zh_title: 国际移民网络中的社会学习
27679.authors: Yuan Tian, Maria Esther Caballero, Brian K. Kovak
27679.abstract: We document the transmission of social distancing practices from the United States to Mexico along migrant networks during the early 2020 Covid-19 pandemic. Using data on pre-existing migrant connections between Mexican and U.S. locations and mobile-phone tracking data revealing social distancing behavior, we find larger declines in mobility in Mexican regions whose emigrants live in U.S. locations with stronger social distancing practices. We rule out confounding pre-trends and use a variety of controls and an instrumental variables strategy based on U.S. stay-at-home orders to rule out the potential influence of disease transmission and migrant sorting between similar locations. Given this evidence, we conclude that our findings represent the effect of information transmission between Mexican migrants living in the U.S. and residents of their home locations in Mexico. Our results demonstrate the importance of personal connections when policymakers seek to change fundamental social behaviors.
27679.zh_abstract: 我们记录了2020年初新冠疫情期间，社交距离实践通过移民网络从美国向墨西哥的传播。利用墨西哥与美国地点之间既有的移民联系数据以及揭示社交距离行为的手机追踪数据，我们发现，在其移民居住于社交距离实践更强的美国地点的墨西哥地区，流动性下降幅度更大。我们排除了混淆性的前期趋势，并使用了多种控制变量以及基于美国居家令的工具变量策略，以排除疾病传播和移民在相似地点之间自选择的潜在影响。基于这些证据，我们得出结论，我们的发现代表了居住在美国的墨西哥移民与其在墨西哥家乡居民之间信息传递的影响。我们的结果证明了当政策制定者试图改变基本社会行为时，个人联系的重要性。
27679.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, ITI；JEL：D83, F22, I12, J61, O15

27678.title: Data and Policy Decisions: Experimental Evidence from Pakistan
27678.zh_title: 数据与政策决策：来自巴基斯坦的实验证据
27678.authors: Michael Callen, Saad Gulzar, Syed Ali Hasanain, Muhammad Yasir Khan, Arman B. Rezaee
27678.abstract: We evaluate a program in Pakistan that equips government health inspectors with a smartphone app which channels data on rural clinics to senior policy makers. The system led to rural clinics being inspected 104% more often after 6 months, but only 43.8% more often after a year, with the latter estimate not attaining significance at conventional levels. There is also no clear evidence that the increase in inspections led to increases in general staff attendance. In addition, we test whether senior officials act on the information provided by the system. Focusing only on districts where the app is deployed, we find that highlighting poorly performing facilities on a dashboard viewed by supervisors raises doctor attendance by 75%. Our results indicate that technology may be able to mobilize data to useful effect, even in low capacity settings
27678.zh_abstract: 我们评估了巴基斯坦的一个项目，该项目为政府卫生检查员配备了一款智能手机应用程序，该程序将农村诊所的数据传送给高级政策制定者。该系统导致6个月后农村诊所被检查的频率增加了104%，但一年后仅增加了43.8%，后一个估计值在常规显著性水平上不显著。也没有明确证据表明检查的增加导致了普通员工出勤率的提高。此外，我们测试了高级官员是否根据系统提供的信息采取行动。仅关注部署了该应用程序的地区，我们发现，在主管查看的仪表板上突出显示表现不佳的设施，使医生出勤率提高了75%。我们的结果表明，即使在能力较低的环境中，技术也可能调动数据产生有效作用。
27678.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：C93, D02, D73, K42, O17

27677.title: Survival Pessimism and the Demand for Annuities
27677.zh_title: 生存悲观主义与年金需求
27677.abstract: The "annuity puzzle" refers to the fact that annuities are rarely purchased despite the longevity insurance they provide. Most explanations for this puzzle assume that individuals have accurate expectations about their future survival. We provide evidence that individuals misperceive their mortality risk, and study the demand for annuities in a setting where annuities are priced by insurers on the basis of objectively-measured survival probabilities but in which individuals make purchasing decisions based on their own subjective survival probabilities. Subjective expectations have the capacity to explain significant rates of non-annuitization, yielding a quantitatively important explanation for the annuity puzzle.
27677.zh_abstract: “年金之谜”指的是尽管年金提供了长寿保险，但很少有人购买。对这一谜题的大多数解释假设个人对其未来生存有准确的预期。我们提供了证据表明个人会错误感知其死亡风险，并研究了在年金由保险公司基于客观测量的生存概率定价，但个人基于其自身主观生存概率做出购买决策的设定下的年金需求。主观预期有能力解释显著的非年金化率，为年金之谜提供了一个数量上重要的解释。

27676.title: Structuring Mortgages for Macroeconomic Stability
27676.zh_title: 为宏观经济稳定设计抵押贷款结构
27676.authors: John Y. Campbell, Nuno Clara, João F. Cocco
27676.abstract: We study mortgage design features aimed at stabilizing the macroeconomy. We model overlapping generations of mortgage borrowers and an infinitely lived risk-averse representative mortgage lender. Mortgages are priced using an equilibrium pricing kernel derived from the lender's endogenous consumption. We consider an adjustable-rate mortgage (ARM) with an option that during recessions allows borrowers to pay only interest on their loan and extend its maturity. We find that this maturity extension option stabilizes consumption growth over the business cycle, shifts defaults to expansions, and is welfare enhancing. The cyclical properties of the maturity extension ARM are attractive to a risk-averse lender so the mortgage can be provided at a relatively low cost.
27676.zh_abstract: 我们研究了旨在稳定宏观经济的抵押贷款设计特征。我们模拟了抵押贷款借款人的世代交叠模型和一个无限期生存的风险厌恶型代表性抵押贷款机构。抵押贷款使用从贷款机构内生消费中推导出的均衡定价核进行定价。我们考虑一种浮动利率抵押贷款，其附带一项期权，允许借款人在经济衰退期间仅支付贷款利息并延长贷款期限。我们发现，这种期限延长期权稳定了经济周期中的消费增长，将违约转移至扩张期，并提高了福利。期限延长型浮动利率抵押贷款的周期性特征对风险厌恶型贷款机构具有吸引力，因此该抵押贷款可以以相对较低的成本提供。

27675.title: The Return to Capital in Capital-Scarce Countries
27675.zh_title: 资本稀缺国家的资本回报率
27675.abstract: In this paper, we use firm-level data to investigate the link between the marginal product of capital and financial rates of return across countries. Computed estimates from financial statement data show that capital-scarce countries display higher marginal products of capital. However, inflation-adjusted financial returns are roughly equal across capital-scarce and capital-abundant countries. The divergence between the marginal products of capital and financial returns implies that there may be little incentive for capital to flow to capital-scarce countries. We suggest that domestic capital-accumulation frictions such as sufficiently large capital adjustment costs can decouple financial rates of return from the marginal product of capital across countries.
27675.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们使用企业层面数据来研究各国资本边际产品与金融回报率之间的联系。根据财务报表数据计算得出的估计显示，资本稀缺国家的资本边际产品更高。然而，经通胀调整后的金融回报率在资本稀缺国家和资本充裕国家之间大致相等。资本边际产品与金融回报率之间的背离意味着资本流向资本稀缺国家的动力可能很小。我们提出，国内资本积累摩擦（例如足够大的资本调整成本）可能导致各国的金融回报率与资本边际产品脱钩。
27675.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM；JEL：E13, F21, G15, G32, O16

27674.title: Estimating Trends in Male Earnings Volatility with the Panel Study of Income Dynamics
27674.zh_title: 利用收入动态面板研究估计男性收入波动趋势
27674.abstract: The possible existence of trends in volatility in the U.S. labor market has been an important issue in both labor economics and macroeconomics. The Panel Study of Income Dynamics (PSID) has been the workhorse data set used to estimate trends in earnings volatility at the individual level. Studies using the PSID have generally shown upward trends in volatility. However, trends estimated with the PSID conflict with those reported from some other survey and administrative data sets, many of which have shown flat or declining trends. This paper, which is part of a group project attempting to reconcile estimates across different data sets, presents new estimates of trends in male earnings volatility in the U.S. from 1970 to 2016 from the PSID, and addresses a number of concerns with the data that might lead its estimates to differ from those obtained in other data sets. The analysis shows that upward trends in male earnings volatility were concentrated in the 1970s and 1980s, and that trends after 1990 have been modest or even non-existent, depending on whether volatility is expected to return to its mid-2000s level after jumping up in the Great Recession. Thus, volatility trends in the PSID are roughly consistent with those studies using other data sets which find flat volatility trends in the last three decades. Examinations of potential biases from unit nonresponse (i.e., attrition), item nonresponse (i.e., don’t knows and refusals) and resulting imputation, and from a number of other features of the PSID that might affect its population representativeness show no evidence of significant bias from any of these factors. However, suggestive evidence that declines in volatility estimated in studies using administrative data may be a result of a larger left tail of earnings and of problematic trimming procedures used in those studies.
27674.zh_abstract: 美国劳动力市场波动性是否存在趋势，一直是劳动经济学和宏观经济学的重要议题。收入动态面板研究（PSID）是估计个体层面收入波动趋势的主要数据集。使用PSID的研究通常显示波动性呈上升趋势。然而，PSID估计的趋势与其他一些调查和行政数据集报告的结果存在冲突，其中许多数据集显示波动性持平或下降。本文是一个旨在协调不同数据集估计结果的团体项目的一部分，利用PSID提供了1970年至2016年美国男性收入波动趋势的新估计，并解决了数据中可能导致其估计结果与其他数据集不同的若干问题。分析表明，男性收入波动的上升趋势主要集中在20世纪70年代和80年代，而1990年之后的趋势较为温和甚至不存在，具体取决于波动性在大衰退期间跃升后是否会恢复到21世纪中期水平。因此，PSID中的波动性趋势与那些使用其他数据集发现过去三十年波动性趋势持平的研究大致一致。对单位无应答（即样本损耗）、项目无应答（即“不知道”和拒绝回答）及由此产生的插补，以及PSID中可能影响其人口代表性的其他若干特征所导致的潜在偏差的检验，均未发现任何这些因素存在显著偏差的证据。然而，有提示性证据表明，使用行政数据的研究估计的波动性下降，可能是由于收入左尾较大以及这些研究中使用的有问题的修剪程序所致。

27673.title: The 1918 Influenza Pandemic and its Lessons for COVID-19
27673.zh_title: 1918年流感大流行及其对COVID-19的启示
27673.authors: Brian Beach, Karen Clay, Martin H. Saavedra
27673.abstract: This article reviews the global health and economic consequences of the 1918 influenza pandemic, with a particular focus on topics that have seen a renewed interest because of COVID-19. We begin by providing an overview of key contextual and epidemiological details as well as the data that are available to researchers. We then examine the effects on mortality, fertility, and the economy in the short and medium run. The role of nonpharmaceutical interventions in shaping those outcomes is discussed throughout. We then examine longer-lasting health consequences and their impact on human capital accumulation and socioeconomic status. Throughout the paper we highlight important areas for future work.
27673.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了1918年流感大流行的全球健康和经济后果，特别关注因COVID-19而重新引起兴趣的主题。我们首先概述关键的背景和流行病学细节，以及研究人员可用的数据。然后，我们考察了短期和中期内对死亡率、生育率和经济的影响。全文讨论了非药物干预措施在塑造这些结果中的作用。接着，我们研究了更持久的健康后果及其对人力资本积累和社会经济地位的影响。在整篇论文中，我们强调了未来工作的重要领域。
27673.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I10, J10, J24, N0

27672.title: Reconciling Trends in Volatility: Evidence from the SIPP Survey and Administrative Data
27672.zh_title: 协调波动性趋势：来自SIPP调查和行政数据的证据
27672.authors: Michael D. Carr, Robert A. Moffitt, Emily E. Wiemers
27672.abstract: As part of a set of papers using the same methods and sample selection criteria to estimate trends in male earnings volatility across a number of survey and administrative datasets, we conduct a new investigation of trends in male earnings volatility from the 1980s to 2014 using data from the Survey of Income and Program Participation (SIPP) survey and the SIPP Gold Standard File (SIPP GSF), which links the SIPP survey to administrative data on earnings. We find that the level of volatility is higher in the SIPP GSF than in the SIPP survey but that the trends are similar. Specifically, over the period where the datasets overlap between 1984 and 2012, volatility in the SIPP survey declines slightly while volatility in the SIPP GSF increases slightly but the differences are small in magnitude. Because the density of low earnings differs considerably across datasets, and volatility may vary across the earnings distribution, we estimate trends in volatility in the SIPP survey and SIPP GSF where we hold the earnings distribution fixed to resemble that in the Panel Study of Income Dynamics (PSID). We find that differences in the underlying earnings distribution explains almost all of the difference in the level of volatility between the SIPP survey and SIPP GSF and it somewhat reduces the small differences in trends.
27672.zh_abstract: 作为一组使用相同方法和样本选择标准来估计多个调查和行政数据集中男性收入波动趋势的论文的一部分，我们利用收入与项目参与调查（SIPP）和SIPP金标准文件（SIPP GSF）的数据，对20世纪80年代至2014年男性收入波动趋势进行了新的调查。SIPP GSF将SIPP调查与行政收入数据相关联。我们发现，SIPP GSF中的波动水平高于SIPP调查，但趋势相似。具体而言，在1984年至2012年数据集重叠的时期内，SIPP调查中的波动性略有下降，而SIPP GSF中的波动性略有上升，但差异幅度很小。由于不同数据集中低收入密度差异很大，且波动性可能随收入分布而变化，我们估计了SIPP调查和SIPP GSF中的波动性趋势，其中我们固定收入分布以类似于收入动态面板研究（PSID）中的分布。我们发现，潜在收入分布的差异几乎解释了SIPP调查和SIPP GSF之间波动水平差异的全部，并在一定程度上减少了趋势上的微小差异。

27671.title: A Quantitative Theory of the Credit Score
27671.authors: Satyajit Chatterjee, Dean Corbae, Kyle P. Dempsey, José-Víctor Ríos-Rull
27671.abstract: What is the role of credit scores in credit markets? We argue that it is a stand in for a market assessment of a person’s unobservable type (which here we take to be patience). We pose a model of persistent hidden types where observable actions shape the public assessment of a person’s type via Bayesian updating. We show how dynamic reputation can incentivize repayment without monetary costs of default beyond the administrative cost of filing for bankruptcy. Importantly we show how an economy with credit scores implements the same equilibrium allocation. We estimate the model using both credit market data and the evolution of individual’s credit scores. We find a 3% difference in patience in almost equally sized groups in the population with significant turnover and a shift towards becoming more patient with age. If tracking of individual credit actions is outlawed, the benefits of bankruptcy forgiveness are outweighed by the higher interest rates associated with lower incentives to repay.
27671.zh_abstract: 信用评分在信贷市场中的作用是什么？我们认为，它代表了市场对个人不可观测类型（此处我们将其视为耐心程度）的评估。我们提出了一个持续隐藏类型的模型，其中可观测行为通过贝叶斯更新塑造了公众对个人类型的评估。我们展示了动态声誉如何在不施加除破产行政成本之外的违约货币成本的情况下激励还款。重要的是，我们展示了拥有信用评分的经济体如何实现相同的均衡分配。我们利用信贷市场数据和个人信用评分的演变来估计该模型。我们发现，在人口中几乎同等规模的群体中，耐心程度存在3%的差异，且群体间存在显著流动，并随着年龄增长而变得更加耐心。如果禁止追踪个人信用行为，破产豁免的好处将被与较低还款激励相关的更高利率所抵消。

27670.title: The Average and Heterogeneous Effects of Transportation Investments: Evidence from Sub-Saharan Africa 1960-2010
27670.zh_title: 交通投资的平均和异质性效应：来自1960-2010年撒哈拉以南非洲的证据
27670.abstract: Previous work on transportation investments has focused on average impacts in high- and middle-income countries. We estimate average and heterogeneous effects in a poor continent, Africa, using roads and cities data spanning 50 years in 39 countries. Using changes in market access due to distant road construction as a source of exogenous variation, we estimate a 30-year elasticity of city population with respect to market access of about 0.08–0.13. Our results suggest that this elasticity is stronger for small and remote cities, and weaker in politically favored and agriculturally suitable areas. Access to foreign cities besides international ports matters little. Additional evidence points suggestively to rural-urban migration as the primary source of this population increase, though we cannot fully rule out natural increase or reallocation across cities.
27670.zh_abstract: 以往关于交通投资的研究主要关注高收入和中等收入国家的平均影响。我们利用涵盖39个国家50年间的道路和城市数据，估算了贫困大陆非洲的平均和异质性效应。利用因远方道路建设导致的市场准入变化作为外生变异的来源，我们估计城市人口对市场准入的30年弹性约为0.08–0.13。我们的结果表明，这种弹性对于小型和偏远城市更强，而在政治受青睐和农业适宜地区则较弱。除国际港口外，通往外国城市的可达性影响甚微。额外的证据提示性地表明，农村向城市迁移是这种人口增长的主要来源，尽管我们不能完全排除自然增长或城市间重新分配的可能性。
27670.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI；JEL：F15, F16, O18, O20, R11, R12, R4

27669.title: Medium-Term Money Neutrality and the Effective Lower Bound
27669.zh_title: 中期货币中性及有效下限
27669.abstract: Conventional wisdom suggests that medium-term money neutrality imposes strong limitations on the effects of monetary policy. The point of this paper is that models with medium- and long-term money neutrality are prone to generate non-existence of equilibria at the effective lower bound (ELB) on interest rates. Non-existence is suggestive of sharp output contractions --- so-called contractionary black holes --- at the ELB. Paradoxically, the case for expansionary monetary policy at the ELB is even stronger in models that feature near money neutrality. The results highlight the benefits of a monetary policy regime in which the central bank temporarily overshoots its inflation target once confronted by the ELB.
27669.zh_abstract: 传统观点认为，中期货币中性对货币政策的效果施加了强有力的限制。本文的要点在于，具有中期和长期货币中性的模型容易在利率有效下限（ELB）处产生均衡不存在的问题。均衡不存在暗示着在ELB处会出现剧烈的产出收缩——即所谓的收缩性黑洞。矛盾的是，在具有近似货币中性特征的模型中，在ELB处实施扩张性货币政策的理由甚至更为充分。这些结果凸显了一种货币政策体制的益处，即当面临ELB时，中央银行暂时使其通胀目标超调。

27668.title: Early Fertility Decline in the United States: Tests of Alternative Hypotheses using New Complete-Count Census Microdata and Enhanced County-Level Data
27668.zh_title: 美国早期生育率下降：利用新完整人口普查微观数据和增强县级数据对替代假说的检验
27668.authors: Michael R. Haines, J. David Hacker, Matthew S. Jaremski
27668.abstract: The U.S. fertility transition in the nineteenth century is unusual. Not only did it start from a very high fertility level and very early in the nation’s development, but it also took place long before the nation’s mortality transition, industrialization, and urbanization. This paper assembles new county-level, household-level, and individual-level data, including new complete-count IPUMS microdata databases of the 1830-1880 censuses, to evaluate different theories for the nineteenth-century American fertility transition. We construct cross-sectional models of net fertility for currently-married white couples in census years 1830-1880 and test the results with subset of couples linked between the 1850-1860 and 1860-1870 censuses. We find evidence of marital fertility control consistent with hypotheses as early as 1830. The results indicate support for several different but complementary theories of the early U.S. fertility decline, including the land availability, conventional structuralist, ideational, child demand/quality-quantity trade-off, and life-cycle savings theories.
27668.zh_abstract: 19世纪美国的生育率转型非同寻常。它不仅始于非常高的生育水平且在国家发展早期，而且远在国家死亡率转型、工业化和城市化之前。本文整理了新的县级、家庭级和个体级数据，包括1830-1880年人口普查的新完整计数IPUMS微观数据库，以评估19世纪美国生育率转型的不同理论。我们构建了1830-1880年人口普查年份中当前已婚白人夫妇的净生育率横截面模型，并使用在1850-1860年和1860-1870年人口普查之间关联的夫妇子集对结果进行检验。我们发现了与假说一致的婚内生育控制证据，最早可追溯到1830年。结果表明，支持几种不同但互补的美国早期生育率下降理论，包括土地可得性、传统结构主义、观念、儿童需求/质量数量权衡以及生命周期储蓄理论。

27667.title: COVID-19 and Crime: Effects of Stay-at-Home Orders on Domestic Violence
27667.zh_title: COVID-19与犯罪：居家令对家庭暴力的影响
27667.authors: Lindsey Rose Bullinger, Jillian B. Carr, Analisa Packham
27667.abstract: COVID-19 has led to an abrupt change in time spent at home, with many cities and states implementing official stay-at-home (SAH), or “lockdown” policies. Using cell phone block-level activity data and administrative 911 and crime data from the city of Chicago, we estimate the effects of the Illinois governor's SAH order on calls for police service, crimes recorded by police, and arrests made relating to domestic violence. We find that the SAH order announcement increased time spent at home, leading to a decrease in total calls for police service, but a subsequent increase in domestic violence-related calls for police service. Effects are larger in areas with a high proportion of renters. These effects for domestic violence calls, however, are at odds with reported domestic-related crimes and arrests by police officers; we find that official reports and arrests for domestic violence crimes fell by 8.7 percent and 26.3 percent, respectively. Trends in reported domestic violence crimes mirror drops in total reported crimes; however, declines for domestic violence crimes are an order of magnitude smaller than the decline in other non-violent crime rates. Overall, we estimate that nearly 1,000 cases of domestic violence crimes went underreported between March and April.
27667.zh_abstract: COVID-19导致居家时间发生急剧变化，许多城市和州实施了正式的居家令（SAH）或“封锁”政策。利用芝加哥市的手机区块级活动数据以及行政911和犯罪数据，我们估计了伊利诺伊州州长居家令对与家庭暴力相关的警察服务呼叫、警方记录的犯罪以及逮捕的影响。我们发现，居家令公告增加了居家时间，导致警察服务总呼叫量减少，但随后与家庭暴力相关的警察服务呼叫增加。在租房者比例高的地区，影响更大。然而，这些对家庭暴力呼叫的影响与警方报告的与家庭相关的犯罪和逮捕情况不一致；我们发现，官方报告的家庭暴力犯罪和逮捕分别下降了8.7%和26.3%。报告的家庭暴力犯罪趋势与总报告犯罪的下降趋势一致；然而，家庭暴力犯罪的下降幅度比其他非暴力犯罪率的下降幅度小一个数量级。总体而言，我们估计在3月至4月期间，有近1000起家庭暴力犯罪案件未被充分报告。
